announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Lagnam Spintex Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 28, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Lagnam Spintex Limited has informed the stock exchanges about the outcomes of its Board Meeting held on March 28, 2026. Further details regarding the decisions made during this meeting are expected to be disclosed.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: The Federal Bank  Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. '.
announcements.ai_summary: Sammaan Capital Limited has confirmed the timely payment of interest on its Secured Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures. The company made an interest payment of INR 0.0480 lacs on debentures with ISIN INE148I07NN5 and INR 5.30658 lacs on debentures with ISIN INE148I07ND6. These payments were due on March 28, 2026, and were actually made on March 27, 2026. The last interest payment for both series was on February 28, 2026. The company has provided this certification in accordance with Regulation 57 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Thermax Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Thermax Limited, through its wholly owned subsidiary Thermax Babcock & Wilcox Energy Solutions Limited (TBWES), has concluded a significant contract for the supply and supervision of installation and commissioning of a boiler package. This contract is for a 1 × 800 MW ultra-supercritical thermal power plant located in Anuppur district, Madhya Pradesh, India, awarded by M/s Anuppur Powerprojects Private Limited. The contract, signed on March 27, 2026, has an approximate value of Rs. 1600 Crore, excluding GST. The scope of work includes design, engineering, manufacturing, supply, supervision of installation and commissioning, and performance guarantee tests. Execution will be aligned with project milestones and delivery schedules.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange about further investment in Indian Horizon Marketing Services Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has made a further investment in Indian Horizon Marketing Services Limited (IHMSL) by subscribing to 25,00,000 Class A Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each. This subscription was made as part of a preferential offer by IHMSL. The total investment made by Thomas Cook (India) Limited amounts to INR 2,50,00,000 (Two Crore fifty lakh Only), with each equity share subscribed at Rs. 10/-. This investment is a further contribution to IHMSL, which is a joint venture in India. The paid-up capital of IHMSL will increase post-allotment.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Aequs Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Aequs Limited has completed the acquisition of 1,000 (One Thousand) equity shares of Aequs Foundation from Hubballi Durable Goods Cluster Private Limited. These shares constitute 50% of the total share capital of Aequs Foundation and have a face value of INR 10/- each. The total consideration for this secondary transaction was INR 10,000/- (Indian Rupees Ten Thousand only). The transfer of these equity shares in favor of Aequs Limited was completed on March 27, 2026. This follows a previous intimation on February 23, 2026, regarding the same acquisition.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Pine Labs Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Pine Labs Limited has received an order from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) on March 23, 2026, imposing a monetary penalty of Rs. 3,10,000/- (Rupees Three Lakh Ten Thousand only). This penalty was levied under Section 30(1) read with Section 26(6) of the Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007. The violation pertains to the issuance of certain Full-KYC Prepaid Payment Instruments without completing the Know Your Customer (KYC) verification of the respective PPI holders, based on supervisory findings. The company has stated that this order has no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities. The company received the order on March 27, 2026.

announcements.company: The Bombay Burmah Trading Corporation Limited
announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: The Bombay Burmah Trading Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: The Bombay Burmah Trading Corporation Limited has completed the sale of its Tea Plantations (Dunsandle Estate) located in Village Sholur, Taluka – Udhagamandalam, District – Nilgiris. The sale was executed via an Asset Purchase Agreement with buyers Mr. Rangasamy, Mrs. Rathinambal, Mr. Durai Arun, Mr. Saran, and Poomex Clothing Company. The total consideration for this divestment is Rs. 1,20,00,00,000/- (Rupees One hundred and twenty crores only), subject to applicable taxes. As of March 27, 2026, Rs. 110 Crores has been received, with the balance consideration to be received as per the agreement.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Limited has launched a new product, the Energion EA4150 AC Stabilizer (150-280V), on March 27, 2026. This product is categorized as B2C Lighting and caters to the domestic market. While this launch did not trigger materiality thresholds, it is being disclosed as a measure of good corporate governance. The company has provided its registered office details, contact information, and CIN for reference.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Marathon Nextgen Realty Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition by Nexzone IT Infrastructure Private Limited, WOS (wholly owned subsidiary) of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Limited has acquired 29,541 shares of its wholly owned subsidiary, Inventurus Knowledge Solutions, Inc. (IKS Inc.), as the first tranche of investment. This acquisition amounts to USD 19,000,476/-. This update is in continuation of the company's earlier disclosure dated March 13, 2026, where the Board had approved further investment in IKS Inc. The acquisition is in accordance with Regulation 30(7) of the SEBI LODR Regulations and was disclosed on March 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.detail: Nagarjuna Fertilizers and Chemicals Limited has informed the Exchange about Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.ai_summary: Ishan Dyes and Chemicals Ltd has approved the allotment of 7,40,700 Equity Shares upon the conversion of warrants. These shares have a face value of ₹ 10/- each and were allotted at an issue price of ₹ 63/- each. The allotment was made to Piyushbhai Natvarlal Patel, a Promoter, who exercised 7,40,700 warrants. This conversion represents the balance 75% of the issue price payment for these warrants. The company had previously allotted 45,84,872 convertible equity warrants on a preferential basis. Following this allotment, Piyushbhai Natvarlal Patel still holds 15,51,736 warrants for future conversion. The Board of Directors approved this allotment at their meeting held on March 28, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Symphony Limited has invested an additional AUD 25 million, equivalent to approximately ₹165 crores, into its wholly-owned Australian subsidiary, Climate Holdings Pty Limited (CHPL). This investment, funded by the company's surplus treasury, will be used to prepay AUD 20 million (approximately ₹132 crores) of outstanding acquisition loans at CHPL and AUD 5 million (approximately ₹33 crores) of working capital borrowings at its operating subsidiary, Climate Technologies Pty Ltd (CTPL). The company has strategically redeemed treasury investments where forward yields have fallen below the borrowing costs of its Australian subsidiaries, especially in light of the Reserve Bank of Australia's recent 50 basis point policy rate hikes in 2026. This move aims to optimize treasury returns and rationalize debt at the subsidiary level.

announcements.subject: Suspension of Trading
announcements.detail: Members of the Exchange are hereby informed that the trading in equity shares of Sanghi Industries Limited shall be suspended w.e.f. April 06, 2026 (i.e., closing hours of trading on April 02, 2026) on account of the Scheme of Amalgamation.
announcements.ai_summary: Trading in the equity shares of Sanghi Industries Limited will be suspended effective April 06, 2026. This suspension is due to a Scheme of Amalgamation. The last day of trading will be the closing hours of April 02, 2026. Investors should be aware of this impending trading halt related to the amalgamation process.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: PNC Infratech Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 27, 2026, titled "Completion of their Sale of Equity Stake in PNC Challakere (Karnataka) Highways Private Limited, a BOT (Toll) Road Project, to Vertis Infrastructure Trust ( VIT ) ".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: PNC Infratech Limited has issued a press release on March 27, 2026, announcing the completion of the sale of its equity stake in PNC Challakere (Karnataka) Highways Private Limited to Vertis Infrastructure Trust (VIT). This transaction marks the final tranche of a divestment initiative that began in January 2024, involving a portfolio of 12 road assets. The total aggregate length of these projects is approximately 3,800 lane-km across four states. The transaction was concluded at an Enterprise Value of Rs. 683.84 crore, which includes Rs 80.48 crore received towards Equity and Rs 134.94 crore received towards Unsecured Loans on March 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: PNC Infratech Limited has informed the Exchange regarding ''.SALE OR DISPOSAL OF AN ASSET/UNDERTAKING OF THE COMPANY
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: PNC Infratech Limited, along with its Wholly Owned Subsidiary PNC Infra Holdings Limited, has transferred its entire stake in PNC Challakere (Karnataka) Highways Private Limited (SPV) to Vertis Infrastructure Trust (VIT) on March 27, 2026. This marks the completion of the transfer of all twelve identified Special Purpose Vehicles (SPVs) as per the Share Purchase Agreement dated January 15, 2024. For the financial year ended March 31, 2025, PNC Challakere (Karnataka) Highways Private Limited contributed Rs. 16402.72 Lakhs (1.30%) to the consolidated revenue and had a net worth of Rs. 7803.22 Lakhs (2.42%) of the consolidated net worth. This divestment is part of a strategic initiative announced in January 2024.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Avenue Supermarts Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Store Opening Intimation'.
announcements.ai_summary: Avenue Supermarts Limited has opened 5 new stores on March 27, 2026. The new store locations are Tirunelveli (Tamil Nadu), Padoli, Chandrapur (Maharashtra), Bareilly (Uttar Pradesh), Sumthana, Nagpur (Maharashtra), and Shahapur, Thane (Maharashtra). Following the opening of these new stores, the total number of stores operated by the company now stands at 477. This update is provided to the stock exchanges for their records.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Bank Of India has informed the Exchange regarding 'Disclosure under Regulation 30 under SEBI LODR , Regulation 2015.'.
announcements.ai_summary: Bank of India has been levied a monetary penalty of Rs. 58,50,000 by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) on March 27, 2026. The penalty was imposed for collecting ad-hoc service charges, inspection charges, or processing charges in Priority Sector Lending (PSL) accounts up to Rs. 25,000, and for not paying the applicable interest rate on Term Deposit Receipts (TDRs) from the maturity date until encashment. The bank has stated that this monetary penalty has no material impact on its financial operations or other activities.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Aditya Birla Money Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Aditya Birla Money Limited has been informed by the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) that a penalty of ₹2,13,864.89 (exclusive of GST) has been imposed on the Company. This penalty is related to Client Code Modifications and pursuant to MCSGFC directives. The Company received this communication on March 27, 2026. While the penalty amount is specified, the Company states that there is no material impact on its financial, operational, or other activities apart from the penalty itself.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Mukand Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mukand Limited has executed two Conveyance Deeds for the sale of land parcels at Dighe. The first deed involves the sale of a 50% undivided share in land admeasuring approximately 9,871 sq. mtrs (2.44 acres) for a consideration of Rs. 43,98,02,405. The second deed is for the sale of a portion of land admeasuring approximately 57,386 sq. mtrs (14.18 acres) for a consideration of Rs. 511,36,66,460. The total consideration for both transactions is Rs. 555,34,68,865. After adjusting Rs. 110,00,00,000 paid earlier, the Company has received the balance consideration of Rs. 445,34,68,865. This follows an earlier intimation dated July 23, 2025.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Central Bank of India has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Central Bank of India has been penalized by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) with a penalty of ₹63.60 lakh (Rupees Sixty-Three Lakh Sixty Thousand only). The penalty was imposed on March 27, 2026, for non-compliance with certain directions issued by the RBI concerning 'Know Your Customer (KYC)' and 'Financial Inclusion - Access to Banking Services - Basic Savings Bank Deposit Account (BSBDA)'. This action was taken under the provisions of section 47A(1)(c) read with sections 46(4)(i) and 51(1) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Power Finance Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange about Transfer of Wagdari Transmission Limited (wholly owned subsidiary of PFC Consulting Limited) (a wholly owned subsidiary of Power Finance Corporation Limited).
announcements.ai_summary: Power Finance Corporation Limited has announced the transfer of Wagdari Transmission Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of PFC Consulting Limited (which is itself a wholly-owned subsidiary of Power Finance Corporation Limited), to KCC Buildcon Private Limited. The transfer was completed on March 27, 2026, for a consideration of ₹4,41,10,826. KCC Buildcon Private Limited is the successful bidder and does not belong to the promoter or promoter group of Power Finance Corporation Limited. The transaction is not in the nature of a slump sale and was conducted at arm's length.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Aksh Optifibre Limited has informed the Exchange regarding ''.
announcements.ai_summary: Aksh Optifibre Limited has received an order from the Hon’ble Debt Recovery Tribunal (DRT), Jaipur, dated March 24, 2026, which was received by the company on March 26, 2026. The DRT has set aside the Demand Notice issued under Section 13(2) and the Possession Notice issued under Section 13(4) of the Securitisation and Reconstruction of Financial Assets and Enforcement of Security Interest (SARFAESI) Act, 2002, by Union Bank of India. Consequently, the securitisation action initiated by the Bank has been quashed by the Hon’ble Tribunal.

announcements.subject: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: K.M.Sugar Mills Limited has informed the Exchange about Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.ai_summary: K.M. Sugar Mills Limited has filed a joint First Motion Application with the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Allahabad Bench, for sanction of a Scheme of Arrangement. The scheme involves the demerger of the 'Distillery Division' of K. M. Sugar Mills Limited (Demerged Company) into KM Spirits and Allied Industries Limited (Resulting Company). The NCLT has ordered K. M. Sugar Mills Limited to issue individual notices and convene meetings of its Equity Shareholders and Unsecured Creditors through Video Conference or Other Audio-Visual Means.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ( Listing Regulations ), read with SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026, we would like to inform the exchanges that the Company s wholly owned subsidiary, Everest Buildpro Private Limited ( EBPL ) has vide its letter dated March 26, 2026, informed the Company that on March 25, 2026, EBPL has allotted 154,150 partly paid-up Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each at a premium of Rs. 8,289/- per equity share, to the Company.Prior to and after the aforesaid subscription, Everest Industries Limited ( the Company ) shall continue to hold 100% of the equity share capital of Everest Buildpro Private Limited, and accordingly, there shall be no change in the shareholding pattern of the subsidiary. Hence, this disclosure is not mandatorily required.The requisite details in terms of the Listing Regulations and aforesaid circular are attached in  Annexure A .
announcements.ai_summary: Everest Industries Limited has disclosed an investment in its wholly-owned subsidiary, Everest Buildpro Private Limited (EBPL). On March 25, 2026, EBPL allotted 154,150 partly paid-up equity shares of Rs. 10 each at a premium of Rs. 8,289 per share to Everest Industries Limited. Despite this allotment, Everest Industries Limited will continue to hold 100% of EBPL's equity share capital, resulting in no change to the shareholding pattern of the subsidiary. EBPL, incorporated on March 31, 2023, is engaged in the manufacturing of Boards & Panels and reported a turnover of Rs. 15,68,47,000 for FY 2024-25.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Sundaram Finance Limited has informed the Exchange regarding ''Exercise of 80 options".
announcements.ai_summary: Sundaram Finance Limited has informed the Exchange about the exercise of 80 stock options granted under the Sundaram Finance Employee Stock Option Scheme – 2008. The options were granted on May 25, 2022, and exercised on March 27, 2026, by one option holder. The company has taken necessary steps for the transfer of equity shares from the Sundaram Finance Employees Welfare Trust to the demat accounts of the respective option holder.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Union Bank of India has informed the Exchange about Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, as amended.
announcements.ai_summary: Bank of India has been penalized Rs. 95,40,000 by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) on March 27, 2026. The penalty was imposed for failing to comply with RBI directions concerning unauthorized electronic banking transactions, specifically by not crediting amounts within 10 working days and not providing a direct link for reporting such transactions on its website. Additionally, the bank failed to adhere to RBI directions on Income Recognition, Asset Classification, and Provisioning processes for advances. The bank has stated that it has implemented necessary preventive measures to avoid future occurrences of such instances, and the impact on its financial or operational activities is not considered significant.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Kross Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Mrs Anita Rai, Promoter and Whole Time Director of the Company has acquired 89,027 equity shares on 27.03.2026 through Open market'.
announcements.ai_summary: Mrs. Anita Rai, a Promoter and Whole Time Director of Kross Limited, has acquired 89,027 equity shares on March 27, 2026, through the open market. This acquisition represents 0.13% of the total issued and paid-up share capital of the company. This transaction is disclosed under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Gujarat Fluorochemicals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 27, 2026, titled "Press Release".
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat Fluorochemicals Limited announced that its subsidiary, GFCL EV, a Global Integrated Battery Materials Company, has raised approximately USD 80 million. This funding is in addition to the USD 50 million previously raised from the International Finance Corporation (IFC). These capital raising efforts are aimed at driving high-value manufacturing, creating jobs, strengthening its position in global supply chains, and advancing priorities in energy security and transport electrification. GFCL EV aims to reinforce India's role as a competitive player in the battery materials value chain with its integrated manufacturing capabilities for battery chemicals, including electrolyte salt LiPF6, electrolyte formulations, additives, cathode active materials (LFP), and binders (PVDF and PTFE).

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Dredging Corporation of India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 27, 2026, titled "Press release - DCIL Marks 50 Years with Ambitious Expansion Roadmap, Modernisation Push, and ₹3,000 Crore Growth Target.- Reg.".
announcements.ai_summary: Dredging Corporation of India Limited has issued a press release dated March 27, 2026, outlining an ambitious expansion roadmap and modernization push. The company targets a growth of ₹3,000 Crore as part of its 50th-anniversary celebrations. This announcement signals a strategic focus on expanding its operations and upgrading its infrastructure to achieve significant growth in the coming period.

announcements.subject: Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.detail: Vraj Iron and Steel Limited has informed the Exchange about Commencement of commercial operations of Induction Furnace unit situated at Bilaspur Chhattisgarh.
announcements.ai_summary: Vraj Iron and Steel Limited has commenced commercial production from its Induction Furnace unit located in Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh, effective March 27, 2026. This unit has an installed capacity of 1,53,000 TPA and has received the Consent to Operate from the Chhattisgarh Environment Conservation Board. The company has stated that this milestone is a significant step in enhancing its production capacity and operational efficiency. The unit is equipped with advanced technology and is expected to positively contribute to the company's overall performance.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: RSWM Limited has announced two key personnel updates. Firstly, Shri Riju Jhunjhunwala (DIN: 00061060) has been re-appointed as the Managing Director of the Company for a period of three years, effective from May 1, 2026, to April 30, 2029. Shri Jhunjhunwala is not debarred from holding this office by any SEBI order or other authority. Secondly, there has been a revision in the remuneration payable to Shri Rajeev Gupta (DIN: 02049516), the Joint Managing Director of the Company. These decisions are in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Craftsman Automation Limited has informed the Exchange about the extension of Long Stop date under the Asset Purchase Agreement entered into between Sunbeam Lightweighting Solutions Limited ("Sunbeam"), Wholly Owned Subsidiary, and Shriram Pistons & Rings Limited ( SPRL ) from 31st March, 2026 to 30th June, 2026 and will complete the Proposed Transaction in multiple tranches. Accordingly, Sunbeam and SPRL have entered into an Amendment  agreement to the APA dated 27th March, 2026 and the closing formalities for the second tranche of the Proposed Transaction are now expected to be completed on or before 30th June, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Craftsman Automation Limited has announced an amendment to the Asset Purchase Agreement (APA) between its wholly owned subsidiary, Sunbeam Lightweighting Solutions Limited (Sunbeam), and Shriram Pistons & Rings Limited (SPRL). The Long Stop date for the APA has been extended from March 31, 2026, to June 30, 2026. The parties have entered into an Amendment Agreement dated March 27, 2026, to facilitate the completion of the proposed transaction in multiple tranches, with the closing formalities for the second tranche now expected by June 30, 2026. This relates to the sale of certain plant and machinery for the Piston Manufacturing Business.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Vraj Iron and Steel Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015, merger order receipt by the promoter group entities.'.
announcements.ai_summary: Vraj Iron and Steel Limited has been informed by its promoter companies that the Hon'ble Regional Director, South East Region, Hyderabad, has approved a scheme of merger by absorption. This scheme, effective from March 18, 2026, involves the merger of Kirti Ispat Private Limited ("KIPL"), Utkal Ispat Private Limited ("UIPL"), and V A Transport Private Limited ("VATPL") with Gopal Sponge and Power Private Limited (GSPPL). Consequently, KIPL, UIPL, and VATPL will cease to exist, and investments held in VATPL within Vraj Iron and Steel Limited will be consolidated under GSPPL. The aggregate holding of the promoters in Vraj Iron and Steel Limited will remain unchanged.

announcements.subject: Memorandum of Understanding/Agreements
announcements.detail: PC Jeweller Limited has informed the Exchange about Memorandum of Understanding with NSDC
announcements.ai_summary: PC Jeweller Limited has executed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the National Skill Development Corporation (NSDC) on March 26, 2026. Under this MoU, PC Jeweller Limited will partner as the Industry/Franchise Partner for the Gems & Jewellery Sector. The agreement aims to develop and onboard up to 2,00,000 micro-entrepreneurs in India over a 5-year period under the PC Jeweller Brand as part of NSDC's National Entrepreneurship Drive (NED) initiative. This partnership is expected to contribute to employment generation and local economic development, while also expanding PC Jeweller's retail footprint.

announcements.subject: Rumour Verification - Regulation 30(11)
announcements.detail: Narayana Hrudayalaya Ltd. has informed the Exchange about Rumour Verification - Regulation 30(11)- Clarification on news articles published in mainstream media
announcements.ai_summary: Narayana Hrudayalaya Ltd. has clarified news articles regarding its hospital operations in Katra. The company stated that its wholly owned subsidiary, Narayana Vaishno Devi Specialty Hospitals Private Limited (NVDSHPL), executed a Business Transfer Agreement (BTA) with Shri Mata Vaishno Devi Charitable Society on March 27, 2026. This BTA formalizes the transition of the hospital to the Society, effective April 1, 2026, with NVDSHPL retaining a supervisory oversight role until 2033. This arrangement was previously disclosed on March 28, 2025, and the current news pertains to its implementation.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Mahindra & Mahindra Financial Services Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Transfer of Equity Shares from Mahindra & Mahindra Financial Services Limited Employees' Stock Option Trust to eligible persons
announcements.ai_summary: Mahindra & Mahindra Financial Services Limited has informed the Exchange that its Employees' Stock Option Trust has transferred 59,399 equity shares of the company on March 27, 2026. These shares were transferred to eligible persons who exercised their vested stock options under the Mahindra Financial Services Limited Employees’ Stock Option Scheme – 2010 and the Mahindra & Mahindra Financial Services Limited – Restricted Stock Units Plan 2023. The details of the eligible persons, including Raul Rebello (44,313 shares), Shantanu Padhye (9,149 shares), Jaysheel Gandhi (2,776 shares), H S Kamath (2,611 shares), and Pasala Ramesh Kumar (550 shares), are provided in Annexure I.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Orient Paper & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Orient Paper & Industries Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting on March 27, 2026, approved a modification to its capital expenditure project at the Amlai (M.P.) manufacturing facility. Instead of previously envisaged modernization initiatives, the company will now install a new Tissue Machine incorporating advanced technology. This revision, originally disclosed on August 5, 2025, is driven by evolving market dynamics, demand patterns, and the need for advanced manufacturing technologies. The modernization project approved on March 15, 2023, has incurred and obligated Rs. 239 crores out of a sanctioned outlay of Rs. 475 crores.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Sheetal Cool Products Limited has informed the Exchange about Disclosure pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 for Launch of New Ice Cream Café
announcements.ai_summary: Sheetal Cool Products Limited has expanded its retail presence by launching a new Ice Cream Café in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, with operations commencing on March 26, 2026, at 6:30 PM. This new outlet, located at Magnifico Complex, Sindhu Bhavan, Ahmedabad, is part of the company's ongoing business expansion strategy to strengthen its brand presence and enhance customer reach. The café will offer the company's premium ice cream products and related items, aiming to provide an enhanced in-store customer experience. This is considered a general business update in the ordinary course of operations.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome Of Board Meeting - Purchase Of Shares Of Empire Mall Private Limited, Omni Infrastructure Private Limited, Hagwood Commercial Developers Private Limited From Prozone Liberty International Limited, WOS Of Prozone Realty Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Prozone Realty Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved the purchase of equity shares of Empire Mall Private Limited, Omni Infrastructure Private Limited, and Hagwood Commercial Developers Private Limited. These shares will be acquired from Prozone Liberty International Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of Prozone Realty Limited based in Singapore. Empire Mall Private Limited has a paid-up share capital of INR 1,36,02,25,320 and a turnover of INR 6,271.36 lakhs. The acquisition is considered an arm's length transaction.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'conclusion of further acquisition of 3,66,49,271 fully paid ordinary shares in Colombo Dockyard PLC (CDPLC), resulting in total acquisition of 51% stake as on date'.
announcements.ai_summary: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Limited has completed the further acquisition of 3,66,49,271 fully paid ordinary shares in Colombo Dockyard PLC (CDPLC). This acquisition, made through a mandatory offer under Sri Lankan regulations, brings Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Limited's total shareholding in CDPLC to 51% as of March 27, 2026. This transaction was part of a Tripartite Agreement with CDPLC and Onomichi Dockyard Co. Ltd. The company had previously disclosed an initial agreement on January 21, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Pearl Global Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about incorporation of subsidiary in Singapore
announcements.ai_summary: Pearl Global Industries Limited has announced the incorporation of a new subsidiary in Singapore, named Pearl Global Fashion Singapore Pte Limited, effective March 27, 2026. This new entity is a step-down subsidiary of Pearl Global Industries Limited, incorporated through its wholly owned subsidiary, Pearl Global (HK) Limited. The subsidiary will operate in the apparels industry as a trading company, catering to clients in Asia, Japan, Europe, and the US. The incorporation was approved by the Accounting and Corporate Regulatory Authority (ACRA) in Singapore. This move is part of the company's strategy to expand its global operations.

announcements.subject: Amendment(s)
announcements.detail: Shriram Pistons & Rings Limited has informed the Exchange about Amendment to Agreement to Purchase Identified Assets
announcements.ai_summary: Shriram Pistons & Rings Limited (SPRL) has entered into an amendment agreement dated March 27, 2026, to its Asset Purchase Agreement (APA) with Sunbeam Lightweighting Solutions Limited. This amendment extends the long stop date for the purchase of identified plant and machinery and related assets from March 31, 2026, to June 30, 2026, and allows for the completion of the proposed transaction in multiple tranches. The closing formalities for the second tranche are now expected to be completed on or before June 30, 2026. This update is in continuation of earlier intimations dated December 19, 2025, and December 31, 2025.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Schneider Electric Infrastructure Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 27, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Schneider Electric Infrastructure Limited, in their meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved a revision in the investment/capital expenditure for enhancing the existing capacity of Switchgears at the company's Vadodara Plant. The earmarked expenditure has been revised from INR 110.2 Crores to INR 156.4 Crores. This revised investment will support additional enhancement in shopfloor, civil, and structural works to facilitate future scalability. The meeting commenced at 3:00 p.m. (IST) and concluded at 3:38 p.m. (IST).

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Bhandari Hosiery Exports Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Disclosure pursuant to Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011'.
announcements.ai_summary: Bhandari Hosiery Exports Limited has announced the allotment of equity shares to Tikani Exports Limited, a Promoter Group entity, under its recently concluded Rights Issue. This allotment is made pursuant to Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. Tikani Exports Limited is exempt from making an open offer as all conditions under Regulation 10(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011, have been fulfilled. The exact shareholding percentages before and after the acquisition are not explicitly stated in the provided text, but the transaction is a result of the Rights Issue.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Affordable Robotic & Automation Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Onelife Capital Advisors Limited has made revisions to its preferential issue plans. The company has updated its Valuation Report, issued by an Independent Registered Valuer, following observations from the Stock Exchanges regarding the in-principle approval application for a preferential issue. This issue involves up to 6,04,839 equity shares to a non-promoter entity. Importantly, the revisions to the Valuation Report have not altered the fair value of the equity shares. Investors can find the revised Valuation Report and details of the changes on the company's website under the "Preferential Issue" section. The company confirms that funds raised from this preferential issue will be utilized within 30 days of receipt from the allottee(s). This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.company: Deepak Fertilizers and Petrochemicals Corporation Limited
announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Deepak Fertilizers And Petrochemicals Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Deepak Fertilizers and Petrochemicals Corporation Limited has responded to a query from BSE regarding a significant increase in the trading volume of its securities. The company has stated that it has been strictly complying with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, by filing all relevant disclosures and announcements within the stipulated timeframes. Deepak Fertilizers confirmed that there are no pending information or announcements that could impact the price or volume behavior of its securities. The company also mentioned that the volume movement is market-driven and they have no further comment on it.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Embassy Developments Limited has filed a writ petition before the Hon’ble High Court of Karnataka challenging an order passed by the Karnataka Industrial Areas Development Board (KIADB) concerning approximately 78 acres of land held by its subsidiary, Embassy East Business Park Limited (EEBPL). The KIADB order was dated March 18, 2026. On March 26, 2026, the High Court heard the matter, and the KIADB counsel agreed not to take further steps pursuant to the impugned order until the next hearing on April 8, 2026. The company is taking this action to safeguard its interests and those of its stakeholders. Investors should await the formal order from the High Court.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Sumit Woods Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Sumit Woods Limited has received in-principle approval from the National Stock Exchange (NSE) for the listing of 25,90,000 Equity shares of Rs. 10/- each. These shares have been allotted pursuant to the conversion of warrants issued on a preferential basis. The distinctive numbers for these shares range from 45268754 to 47858753. The NSE has granted this approval, and the shares will be listed and admitted to dealings on the Exchange upon confirmation of credit to the beneficiaries' accounts by NSDL/CDSL.

announcements.subject: Diversification/Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Info Edge (India) Limited has informed the Exchange about Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Info Edge (India) Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved the transfer of the company's entire stake in Shopkirana E Trading Private Limited to Trustroot Internet Private Limited (TIPL). This action is a divestment of Info Edge's holding in Shopkirana, which was held through its subsidiary Startup Investments (Holding) Limited (SIHL). SIHL will transfer 60,673 shares, representing 26.14% on a fully converted and diluted basis, of Shopkirana to TIPL for USD 32,970,499.20. In consideration, TIPL will allot 1,04,868 preference shares to SIHL, representing 2.021% on a fully converted and diluted basis, valued at USD 314.40 per share. This transaction is a part of the company's ongoing strategic realignment.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Info Edge (India) Limited has informed the Exchange about Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Info Edge (India) Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved the transfer of the company's entire stake in Shopkirana E Trading Private Limited to Trustroot Internet Private Limited (TIPL). This transfer is part of a prior agreement where Startup Investments (Holding) Limited (SIHL), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Info Edge, was in discussions with TIPL for the acquisition of SIHL's stake in Shopkirana. SIHL will transfer 60,673 shares, representing 26.14% on a fully converted and diluted basis, of Shopkirana to TIPL for an aggregate consideration of USD 32,970,499.20. In return, TIPL will issue and allot 1,04,868 preference shares to SIHL, representing 2.021% on a fully converted and diluted basis, at a value of USD 314.40 per share. This transaction is a significant step in Info Edge's strategic investments.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Global Education Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 27, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Global Education Limited's Board of Directors, in their meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved the introduction of new student-centric service offerings. These services will include student enrollment assistance, admission facilitation, counseling, guidance, student support, and ancillary services like educational materials and uniforms. This initiative represents an expansion of the company's service portfolio within the education segment, aimed at enhancing value-added services and creating additional revenue streams. The Board also reviewed general business operations and approved a Policy on effective two-way communication between Statutory Auditors and Those Charged with Governance.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, as amended ( SEBI Listing Regulations )   Filing of Company Application for Composite Scheme of Amalgamation and Arrangement before Hon ble NCLT
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Refex Industries Limited has filed a Company Application with the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Chennai Bench, on March 26, 2026. This application seeks necessary directions for the Composite Scheme of Amalgamation and Arrangement. This scheme involves Refex Green Mobility Limited as the Transferor Company, Refex Industries Limited as the Transferee Company (and Demerged Company), and Refex Mobility Limited as the Resulting Company. This filing is a continuation of previous intimations dated September 22, 2025, and March 17, 2026, and is in accordance with Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013. Investors should monitor the NCLT proceedings for further updates on the proposed amalgamation and arrangement.

announcements.subject: Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.detail: Poddar Pigments Limited has informed the Exchange about Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.ai_summary: Poddar Pigments Limited has commenced commercial production for an additional 6000 Metric Tons Per Annum (MTPA) of Colour Masterbatches at its Chaksu Plant in Jaipur, Rajasthan. This expansion, which increases the plant's capacity from the existing 8030 MTPA, was undertaken at a capital expenditure of Rs. 1090.01 lakhs. The commencement of operations took place on March 27, 2026, as part of the company's overall growth strategy. This development is expected to contribute to PPL’s expansion plans within the pigments sector.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: MMP Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 27, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: MMP Industries Limited's Board of Directors held its Meeting No. 6 for FY 2025-26 on March 27, 2026, from 10:45 am to 12:05 pm. During the meeting, the Board considered and approved the Annual Business Plan and Budget for the Financial Year 2026-27. This approval is a key step in the company's strategic planning and operational roadmap for the upcoming fiscal year.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: AYM Syntex Limited has informed the Exchange about Allotment of 33,000 Equity Shares under AYM Employee Stock Option Scheme 2021.
announcements.ai_summary: AYM Syntex Limited's Finance Committee of the Board of Directors has approved the allotment of 33,000 fully paid-up equity shares under the AYM Employee Stock Option Scheme 2021. These shares, with a face value of Rs. 10 per share, were allotted to eligible employees upon their exercise of stock options on March 27, 2026. These newly allotted equity shares will rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the company. Consequently, the company's paid-up share capital has increased from Rs. 58,58,10,910 (5,85,81,091 equity shares) to Rs. 58,61,40,910 (5,86,14,091 equity shares).

announcements.subject: Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.detail: PCBL Chemical Limited has informed the Exchange about Commissioning of additional Brownfield capacity of 30,000 MT of Carbon Black by M/s PCBL (TN) Limited, Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: PCBL Chemical Limited announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, M/s PCBL (TN) Limited, has commissioned an additional brownfield capacity of 30,000 MT of Carbon Black at its plant in Tamil Nadu. Commercial production from this new capacity commenced effectively on March 27, 2026. This expansion is expected to enhance the company's production capabilities and contribute to its long-term growth plans by meeting market requirements. The existing capacity was 2,07,000 MTPA, with an 88% utilization rate.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Sundaram Finance Limited has informed the Exchange regarding the approval granted by the Board of Directors to raise funds during FY 2026-27 by issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures on a Private Placement Basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Sundaram Finance Limited's Board of Directors has approved a proposal to raise funds up to ₹17,000 crore during the financial year 2026-27. The fundraising will be conducted through the issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures on a private placement basis, potentially in one or more tranches. This decision was made during the Board Meeting held on March 27, 2026, which commenced at 10:00 A.M. and concluded at 11:50 A.M. This move is intended to strengthen the company's financial resources for its operations in the upcoming fiscal year.

announcements.subject: Capacity addition
announcements.detail: Trident Limited has informed the Exchange that the Company has successfully commissioned the additional capacity of 5.40 MWp rooftop Solar Power Project at Budhni, Madhya Pradesh.
announcements.ai_summary: Trident Limited has successfully commissioned an additional capacity of 5.40 MWp for its rooftop Solar Power Project at Budhni, Madhya Pradesh. This commissioning, effective March 27, 2026, brings the total installed capacity of the Solar Power Plant at the Budhni facility to 57.32 MWp. The proposed capacity addition involved an investment of approximately INR 10 Crore, financed through internal accruals. The rationale behind this expansion is the adoption of renewable energy to reduce the company's carbon footprint. The existing capacity was 51.92 MWp, operating at 100% utilization.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Renaissance Global Limited has informed the Exchange about launched of  ISSHŌ , a new lab-grown diamond jewellery collection developed in collaboration with Shibani Akhtar.
announcements.ai_summary: Renaissance Global Limited announced that its luxury brand, Irasva Fine Jewellery, has launched "ISSHŌ," a new lab-grown diamond jewellery collection. This collection is developed in collaboration with Shibani Akhtar and marks Irasva's first dedicated exploration into lab-grown diamonds. The name "ISSHŌ" means "together" in Japanese, reflecting the creative synergy between Irasva's Founder and Creative Director, Leshna Shah, and Shibani Akhtar. The collection features pieces crafted in gold and set with certified lab-grown diamonds, characterized by sculptural forms, refined geometry, and versatile silhouettes designed for everyday wear. The launch positions lab-grown diamonds as a deliberate and forward-looking choice, aligning with evolving consumer values around transparency, responsibility, and accessible luxury.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Royal Orchid Hotels Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 27, 2026, titled "Press Release".
announcements.ai_summary: Royal Orchid Hotels Limited announced the signing of a new upscale property, Regenta Hotel, Mundra, in Gujarat. This property will be operated under a hotel management agreement, aligning with ROHL's asset-light expansion strategy. The upcoming hotel, located in the port city of Mundra, will feature 103 keys and is designed to cater to business travelers and logistics professionals. It will offer premium facilities including an all-day dining restaurant, swimming pool, gym, spa, and extensive parking for over 150 vehicles. The hotel will also feature significant event spaces, with a Grand Ballroom of 10,000 sq. ft. and a Junior Ballroom of 4,000 sq. ft., positioning it as a venue for corporate gatherings and social celebrations. The property is scheduled to open by Q4 2027.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Marine Electricals (India) Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Marine Electricals (India) Limited has announced a proposal to convert M/s. Narhari Engineering Works, a partnership firm where the company holds a 99% stake, into a Private Limited Company. This conversion will be conducted in accordance with applicable laws and regulations. The company has proposed three potential names for the new entity: MEL Heavy Industries Private Limited, MEL Advanced Machines Private Limited, or MEL Heavy Machineries Private Limited, subject to regulatory approvals. Marine Electricals (India) Limited will maintain its existing 99% shareholding in the converted entity, reflecting its current partnership contribution. This disclosure is being made as part of the company's commitment to good corporate governance. The company is seeking to have this information recorded by the stock exchange.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: PB Fintech Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: PB Fintech Limited's wholly-owned subsidiary, Paisabazaar Marketing and Consulting Private Limited ("Paisabazaar"), has received an order under Section 26(3) of the Prohibition of Benami Property Transactions Act, 1988, from the Office of the Adjudicating Authority, Prohibition of Benami Property Transactions Act, New Delhi. The order, dated March 24, 2026, and received on March 26, 2026, confirmed an earlier order by the Initiating Officer regarding alleged beneficial ownership in transactions with certain vendors. Paisabazaar intends to file an appeal against this order. As the order is appealable and an appeal will be filed, there is no immediate financial impact on the company.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: One Point One Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 27, 2026, titled Disclosure under Regulation 30- Managing Director Honored with Most Promising Business Leader of the Year  Award at ET Edge Asian Business Leaders Conclave 2026..
announcements.ai_summary: One Point One Solutions Limited has announced that its Managing Director and Chairman, Mr. Akshay Chhabra, has been honored with the 'Most Promising Business Leader of the Year' award at the ET Edge Asian Business Leaders Conclave 2026. This award recognizes Mr. Chhabra's leadership, long-term business building approach, and focus on results in a dynamic market. The company has experienced strengthened operations, improved service delivery, and scaled its multi-location model under his leadership. This recognition was announced via a press release on March 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Aequs Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Aequs Limited has entered into a non-binding Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with the Government of Karnataka on March 26, 2026, to facilitate the expansion of its manufacturing facilities. This expansion will occur within the Aequs Special Economic Zone in Belagavi and in the Hubballi Durable Goods Cluster in Itigatti and Gamanagatti Industrial Area, Hubballi, through its subsidiaries. The estimated cumulative investment for these projects, including existing and proposed investments, is approximately INR 2,856 Crores over a five-year period starting from FY 2026. This MOU aims to secure statutory and regulatory facilitation for the proposed expansion.

announcements.subject: Awarding of order(s)/contract(s)
announcements.detail: TITAGARH RAIL SYSTEMS LIMITED has informed the Exchange about Awarding of order(s)/contract(s)
announcements.ai_summary: Titagarh Rail Systems Limited has received a Letter of Intent (LOI) dated March 24, 2026, to be appointed as a Lessor for providing 2 BFNS 22.9T rakes on an operating lease basis to Indian Railways. This is the first contract secured by the company under its Wagon Leasing Business, following a wagon leasing license signed with Indian Railways on February 9, 2026. The contract, awarded by Balmer Lawrie & Co. Ltd., is for a period of 10 years and is valued at ₹44.41 Crores, inclusive of GST. The rakes will be used to transport HR Coils, Sheets & Plates.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Hilton Metal Forging Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Hilton Metal Forging Limited has secured a contract for the supply of 360,000 standard 155mm M107 empty bomb artillery shells. The order, valued at approximately Rs. 720.00 Crores, will be executed over 24 months with a supply rate of 15,000 units per month. The contract is subject to the approval of a sample batch of 10 pieces and receipt of advance payments based on prototype approval. This order has been awarded by a domestic entity.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hilton Metal Forging Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 26, 2026, titled "Hilton Metal Forging Limited Enters into Interim Sales Agreement for Supply of 360,000 Standard 155mm M107 Bomb Artillery Shells (Approx Value Rs. 720.00 Cr)".
announcements.ai_summary: Hilton Metal Forging Limited has issued a press release on March 26, 2026, announcing an Interim Sales Agreement for the supply of 360,000 standard 155mm M107 empty bomb artillery shells. The approximate value of this order is Rs. 720.00 Crores. The agreement includes a structured delivery schedule of 15,000 units per month over a 24-month period. The payment terms involve a rolling advance equivalent to 50% of three months' supply, with monthly invoicing payable prior to dispatch. Supplies are expected to commence upon completion of requisite formalities and receipt of advance payments.

announcements.subject: Memorandum of Understanding/Agreements
announcements.detail: Rajputana Stainless Limited has informed the Exchange about Memorandum of Understanding/Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: Rajputana Stainless Limited has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) for the proposed acquisition of land located at Revenue Survey No. 774/1, Khata No. 871, Village Padla, Taluka Shankheshwar, Dist. Patan. The advance paid for this proposed acquisition is ₹10 Crores 45 Lacs, and the total consideration is ₹18 Crores plus stamp duty. This acquisition is contingent upon the completion of due diligence, execution of definitive agreements, and obtaining necessary statutory approvals. Further disclosures will be made upon the finalization of the agreements and completion of the transaction.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Deepak Nitrite Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Deepak Nitrite Limited announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Deepak Chem Tech Limited (DCTL), has issued and allotted 9% Optionally Convertible Redeemable Preference Shares (OCRPS) with a face value of ₹100 each. On March 26, 2026, DCTL allotted 1,10,00,000 OCRPS, aggregating to ₹110 Crores, to Deepak Phenolics Limited (DPL), another wholly-owned subsidiary. Additionally, DCTL allotted 25,00,000 OCRPS, aggregating to ₹25 Crores, to Deepak Nitrite Limited itself. DCTL's current paid-up capital before this allotment was ₹2099.50 Crores. The turnover of DCTL for FY 2024-25 was ₹9.43 Crores.

announcements.company: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited
announcements.subject: Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.detail: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange about giving Corporate guarantees issued for Clean Max Como Private Limited and Clean Max Pacific Private Limited, subsidiaries of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited has informed the stock exchanges on March 26, 2026, about the issuance of corporate guarantees for its subsidiaries, Clean Max Como Private Limited and Clean Max Pacific Private Limited. These guarantees were issued in favor of the lenders as security for term loan facilities availed by the respective subsidiaries. Clean Max Como Private Limited received a corporate guarantee of ₹84 Crore, while Clean Max Pacific Private Limited received a guarantee of ₹88 Crore. The company stated that the promoter/promoter group/group companies do not have any interest in these transactions, and the guarantees are issued on an arm's length basis. These corporate guarantees represent contingent liabilities for Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited, but as of the reporting date, they have no impact on the listed entity as they are part of the consolidated group.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: RattanIndia Enterprises Limited has informed the Exchange that the Company made further investment by acquiring an additional equity stake in RattanIndia Power Limited (RPL) resulting RPL to become an associate company of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: RattanIndia Enterprises Limited has increased its equity stake in RattanIndia Power Limited (RPL) by acquiring an additional 0.19% through a secondary purchase. This acquisition has raised the total shareholding of RattanIndia Enterprises Limited in RPL from 19.813% to 20.003%. Consequently, RPL has now become an associate company of RattanIndia Enterprises Limited, as per applicable accounting standards and the Companies Act, 2013. The total paid-up equity share capital of RPL is ₹5370,10,58,600/-, divided into 537,01,05,860 equity shares of face value ₹10 each.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Vardhman Polytex Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 26, 2026 for allotment of 31,25,000 shares upon conversion of warrants issued on preferential basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Vardhman Polytex Limited's board of directors, in a meeting held on March 26, 2026, approved the allotment of 31,25,000 equity shares. These shares are fully paid-up at a price of ₹12.55 per share, including a premium of ₹11.55 per share. This allotment is consequent to the conversion of 31,25,000 warrants, which were previously issued on a preferential basis. The conversion occurred upon receipt of ₹2,94,14,063/-, representing 75% of the issue price per warrant, from the allottees. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased to ₹48,30,19,004/-, comprising 48,30,19,004 equity shares of ₹1 each.

announcements.subject: Sale or disposal
announcements.detail: Sundaram Clayton Limited has informed the Exchange about Sale or disposal
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sundaram-Clayton Limited has completed the sale of its land admeasuring 16.33 acres, located at Korattur Village, Ambattur Taluk, Chennai District, Tamil Nadu. The transaction, initially announced on January 8, 2026, with an Agreement to Sell executed with Canopy Living LLP, has now been finalized. The company received the balance consideration of ₹533.62 crore on March 26, 2026, at 3:50 p.m. IST, in full and final settlement of the transaction. This follows an initial advance payment of ₹25 crore received earlier. This disclosure is made under Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Ola Electric Mobility Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 26, 2026, titled "Ola Electric Launches #EndICEAge Campaign: EVs Now Starting at ₹49,999, with Service Trust Guarantee, Buyback Guarantee and Benefits up to ₹50,000".
announcements.ai_summary: Ola Electric Mobility Limited has launched its #EndICEAge campaign, offering EVs starting at ₹49,999 with benefits up to ₹50,000, valid until March 31, 2026. The campaign includes a Service Trust Guarantee, providing free Ola cab vouchers for service delays, and a Buyback Guarantee offering up to 60% assured buyback value for future upgrades. Additionally, an 8-year extended warranty is now standard across their vehicle portfolio. The Gen 3 S1 X (2kWh) and Roadster X (2.5 kWh) are priced at ₹49,999 during this promotional period. This initiative aims to accelerate India's transition to electric mobility by making EVs a more compelling choice for consumers.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Nucleus Software Exports Limited has informed the Exchange about the Board of Directors, at its meeting held on March 25, 2026, has approved the request of Dr. Ritika Dusad, Executive Director, for an extension of her sabbatical leave for a further period of up to one year i.e. until March 30, 2027
announcements.ai_summary: Nucleus Software Exports Limited's Board of Directors, at a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the request of Dr. Ritika Dusad, Executive Director, for an extension of her sabbatical leave. The extension is for a further period of up to one year, making her leave extend until March 30, 2027. Dr. Dusad is currently pursuing a management development program and trainings to enhance her business management skills and explore areas of potential business interest to her and the company. She is expected to resume her responsibilities upon completion of her sabbatical.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Oracle Financial Services Software Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: Oracle Financial Services Software Limited (OFSS) and Oracle Corporation have entered into a definitive agreement with a global bank headquartered in the USA for a proposed transaction. Under this agreement, OFSS will license certain software products in perpetuity to the customer and provide transition services and personnel. The consummation of this proposed transaction is subject to certain conditions precedent, which must be fulfilled on or before May 29, 2026. This transaction will supersede existing software license, professional services, and support agreements with the customer. OFSS will notify the exchanges on the status of these conditions and the completion of the transaction.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: HCL Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Release   "HCLTech recognized by Hurun and S&P for sustainability initiatives"'.
announcements.ai_summary: HCL Technologies Limited has announced its recognition by Hurun and S&P for its sustainability initiatives. The company was ranked No. 2 overall in the Perpetual Capital–Hurun India Impact 50 2026 report for its commitment to embedding sustainability in its business strategy and its efforts towards the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDG). HCLTech also secured the No. 1 position in Gender Equality and Affordable & Clean Energy, and No. 2 in Sustainable Cities and Communities and Responsible Consumption and Production. Furthermore, for the fourth consecutive year, HCLTech was included in the S&P Global Sustainability Yearbook, highlighting its strong ESG performance. The company also received a Gold rating from EcoVadis and was recognized in TIME magazine’s list of World’s Most Sustainable Companies 2025.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Our Bank has opened Two New Branches on March 26, 2026 and as on date the Bank has 937 Branches in total.
announcements.ai_summary: City Union Bank Limited has opened two new branches on March 26, 2026, in Tirupati (Bairagipatteda) and Bhopal (Kolar Road). Following these openings, the bank now operates a total of 937 branches across India. This expansion is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations 2015. The new branches are identified by branch numbers 936 and 937, with CBS codes 00941 and 00942, respectively. The bank has informed the exchanges about this development for dissemination to all concerned stakeholders.

announcements.company: The Bombay Burmah Trading Corporation Limited
announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: The Bombay Burmah Trading Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange about the sale of Tea Plantations -Dunsandle Estate
announcements.ai_summary: The Bombay Burmah Trading Corporation Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 26, 2026, approved the sale of its Tea Plantations, specifically the Dunsandle Estate, situated in the Nilgiris district. This divestment is contingent upon receiving all required approvals and permissions from relevant authorities. The Dunsandle Estate division contributed Rs. 5.65 Cr, representing 2.05% of the company's turnover, and Rs. 7.10 Cr, or 3.76% of its net worth, in the preceding financial year. The definitive agreements for this sale are yet to be executed, and the completion date will be determined by mutual agreement. The buyers identified are Mr. Rangasamy, his family members, and Poomex Clothing Company, none of whom are associated with the promoter group.

announcements.company: The Bombay Burmah Trading Corporation Limited
announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: The Bombay Burmah Trading Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 26, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of The Bombay Burmah Trading Corporation Limited, in its meeting held on March 26, 2026, approved the sale of its Tea Plantations known as Dunsandle Estate, located in Nilgiris district. This sale is subject to obtaining necessary approvals, consents, and permissions from the concerned authorities. The division contributed Rs. 5.65 Cr (2.05%) to the company's turnover and Rs. 7.10 Cr (3.76%) to its net worth in the last financial year. Definitive agreements for the sale will be executed in due course, and the completion date will be mutually agreed upon. No consideration has been received as of the announcement date. The buyers include Mr. Rangasamy and his family members, along with Poomex Clothing Company, none of whom belong to the promoter group.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Allotment of Employee Stock Options'.
announcements.ai_summary: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Limited has allotted 3,675 equity shares of Re.1/- each, fully paid up, on March 26, 2026. These shares were allotted to eligible employees upon the exercise of their Stock Options under the Dr. Reddy’s Employees ADR Stock Option Scheme, 2007. Of the total shares allotted, 575 shares were exercised at Re.1/- each with Nil premium, and 3,100 shares were exercised at Rs. 735.80/- each with a premium of Rs.734.80/- per share. Following this allotment, the total issued shares of the company have increased to 83,46,57,970, with a total issued share capital of Rs. 83,46,57,970/-.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Alankit Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 26, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Alankit Limited announced on March 26, 2026, the outcomes of its Board of Directors meeting. The board approved the sale of gold held as an investment. Additionally, the board approved an investment in Alankit Imaginations Limited, which is a wholly-owned subsidiary of the company. The board meeting commenced at 1:15 P.M. (IST) and concluded at 1:40 P.M. (IST) on March 26, 2026. The outcome of the meeting is also being uploaded to the company's website.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Allied Digital Services Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Allied Digital Services Limited has announced an equity conversion by its wholly owned overseas subsidiary, Allied Digital Inc. Effective March 25, 2026, Allied Digital Inc. will convert its entire outstanding loan into equity by issuing 6,868 equity shares to the parent company. The conversion price is set at USD 1,877.99 per share, with a face value of USD 10 per share, resulting in a total conversion value of USD 12.89 million. This transaction is a continuation of the company's disclosure dated February 04, 2026, and is in accordance with SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'The CCI has considered the proposed transaction as mentioned in the attachment and approved the same'.
announcements.ai_summary: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Limited has received approval from the Competition Commission of India (CCI) for a proposed transaction. This approval follows the company's earlier disclosure on January 14, 2026, regarding the execution of a Share Subscription and Share Purchase Agreement (SSPA) and a Shareholders’ Agreement (SHA). These agreements are in relation to an investment in Groww Asset Management Limited (Groww AMC) by State Street Global Advisors, Inc. The CCI's approval, bearing Registration No. C-2026/02/1385, signifies a significant step towards the completion of the proposed transaction.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Vedant Fashions Limited has informed the Exchange regarding the compounding under the Legal Metrology Act, 2009, vide the enclosed letter.
announcements.ai_summary: Vedant Fashions Limited has provided an update regarding a compounding proceeding under the Legal Metrology Act, 2009. On December 16, 2025, the company received a Seizure Memo from the Department of Legal Metrology, Varanasi, citing an alleged violation related to non-disclosure of product size on labels. The company responded by requesting compounding of the offence on February 20, 2026, proposing a minimum applicable fee. Subsequently, on March 17, 2026, the Authority issued a notice related to this matter. The company has enclosed a letter detailing these developments for the exchange's records.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: L&T Technology Services Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 25, 2026, titled "L&T Technology Services Pivots on Engineering Intelligence, Divests SWC Business".
announcements.ai_summary: L&T Technology Services Limited has issued a press release dated March 25, 2026, titled "L&T Technology Services Pivots on Engineering Intelligence, Divests SWC Business." This release follows the company's announcement of entering into a Business Transfer Agreement to sell its Smart World and Communication Business Unit. The press release provides further details on the company's strategic decision to divest this business segment. Investors can refer to the press release for a comprehensive understanding of the rationale and implications of this divestment.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Lemon Tree Hotels Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 25, 2026, titled "Opening of Keys Select by Lemon Tree Hotels, Vadodara".
announcements.ai_summary: Lemon Tree Hotels Limited has announced the opening of its new property, Keys Select by Lemon Tree Hotels, Vadodara. This marks the 11th property for the company in Gujarat. The hotel features 42 well-appointed rooms, a restaurant, a banquet hall, and a meeting room. This is a slight adjustment from the previously disclosed 45 rooms on October 17, 2023. The company has released a press release detailing this new opening, which is available on their website and has been submitted to the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Change in Auditors
announcements.detail: Punjab National Bank has informed the Exchange regarding Change in Auditors of the company.
announcements.ai_summary: Punjab National Bank has informed the Exchange about a change in its Statutory Central Auditors (SCAs) for the Financial Year 2025-26. Pursuant to a letter from the Reserve Bank of India dated March 25, 2026, M/s P S D & Associates has ceased to be part of the SCA team with immediate effect. The following firms will continue as the Statutory Central Auditors for the Financial Year 2025-26: M/s Ummed Jain & Co., M/s N K Bhargava & Co., M/s Prem Gupta & Co., and M/s P A & Associates. This information is being submitted in compliance with Regulation 30 and 51 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.company: Deepak Fertilizers and Petrochemicals Corporation Limited
announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Deepak Fertilizers And Petrochemicals Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: Deepak Fertilizers And Petrochemicals Corporation Limited has entered into a Novation Agreement on March 25, 2026, with Equinor ASA and its Singapore-based wholly-owned subsidiary, Deepak Globalchem PTE. LTD (DGPL). This agreement novates the long-term supply agreement for Liquefied Natural Gas (LNG) that was originally entered into between Deepak Fertilizers and Petrochemicals Corporation Limited and Equinor on February 19, 2024. The novated LNG supply arrangement will provide annual supplies of up to 0.65 million tonnes for a period of 15 years, commencing from 2026, on the same commercial terms as the original agreement.

announcements.subject: Other Restructuring
announcements.detail: Persistent Systems Limited has informed the Exchange about Other Restructuring
announcements.ai_summary: Persistent Systems Limited has signed a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) on March 25, 2026, for the transfer of 100% shareholding of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Persistent Systems France S.A.S., to Aepona Group Limited, Ireland, another wholly-owned subsidiary. This transaction is part of an internal group restructuring.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited has issued a Corrigendum Order dated March 24, 2026, from the National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench. This order is in continuation of a previous intimation dated March 24, 2026, regarding the proposed amalgamation of J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Limited with Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited. The corrigendum order has been uploaded on the Tribunal's website, nclt.gov.in, on March 25, 2026. This update is for the information and records of the exchange.

announcements.company: Jaro Institute of Technology Management and Research Limited
announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Jaro Institute of Technology Management and Research Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Approved and allotment of 2,352 fully paid-up equity shares of Rs. 10/- each upon exercise of options granted under Jaro Education Employee Stock Option Plan 2022.'.
announcements.ai_summary: Jaro Institute of Technology Management and Research Limited's Board of Directors, through a resolution passed on March 25, 2026, has allotted 2,352 fully paid-up equity shares of Rs. 10/- each. These shares were allotted upon the exercise of options granted under the Jaro Education Employee Stock Option Plan 2022 to eligible employees.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Shreeji Shipping Global Limited has informed the Exchange about Incorporation of Subsidiary Company under the name Shreeji Tisha Maritime Private Limited, bearing Corporate Identification Number (CIN): U69100GJ2026PTC175627. The Certificate of Incorporation was issued by the Central Registration Centre, Manesar, on March 25, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Shreeji Shipping Global Limited has incorporated a new subsidiary named Shreeji Tisha Maritime Private Limited, with Corporate Identification Number U69100GJ2026PTC175627. The Certificate of Incorporation was issued by the Central Registration Centre, Manesar, on March 25, 2026. This new entity will be involved in activities such as shipping cargo agency services and the building of ships and floating structures, representing a strategic move to expand business operations and create new growth avenues.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Sula Vineyards Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 25, 2026, titled "Sula Vineyards (NSE: SULA) Signs a Definitive Agreement to Acquire Chandon s World-Class Wine Estate Spanning 19 Acres in Nashik to Expand its Wine Tourism Footprint".
announcements.ai_summary: Sula Vineyards Limited has announced the signing of a definitive agreement to acquire Chandon's wine production estate, which spans 19 acres in Nashik. This acquisition is aimed at expanding Sula Vineyards' wine tourism footprint. The press release, dated March 25, 2026, details this strategic move by India's largest wine producer to enhance its presence in the wine tourism sector.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Aksh Optifibre Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Aksh Optifibre Limited has received a Rectification Order dated March 25, 2026, from the Deputy Commissioner, Rajasthan State Tax, Jaipur. This order modifies a previous demand dated December 29, 2025. The original demand, which included applicable interest and penalty, was ₹5,73,47,563.
