announcements.ai_summary: Persistent Systems Limited has appointed Ms. Ruchi Kulhari as Executive Vice President (EVP) and Chief of Staff. This appointment is effective from Monday, March 23, 2026 (EST). The company has provided the requisite disclosure as per SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: JK Tyre & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Report from the Audit Committee of Directors and Independent Directors of the Company certifying distribution of proceeds to eligible shareholders of fractional entitlements pursuant to the Scheme of Amalgamation of Cavendish Industries Ltd. with JK Tyre & Industries Ltd. and their respective shareholders.'
announcements.ai_summary: JK Tyre & Industries Limited has reported that the Audit Committee and Independent Directors have certified the distribution of proceeds from fractional entitlements. This distribution is pursuant to the Scheme of Amalgamation of Cavendish Industries Ltd. with JK Tyre & Industries Ltd. Proceeds from the sale of shares allotted upon consolidation of fractional entitlements have been distributed to eligible shareholders of erstwhile Cavendish Industries Ltd.

announcements.subject: Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.detail: Electronics Mart India Limited has informed the Exchange about Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.ai_summary: Electronics Mart India Limited has commenced commercial operations for a new Multi-Brand Store under the brand name ‘ELECTRONICS MART’. The store is located at Shop No. 1 & 2, S-2, S-2/4, Ground Floor, Commercial Shopping Centre-1, Avantika, Sector-1, Rohini, Delhi-110085, spanning 3,200 square feet. Commercial operations began on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Bhavesh Pravin Sheth has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Bhavesh Pravin Sheth has submitted a disclosure to the Exchange under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: PC Jeweller Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: PC Jeweller Limited's Board of Directors has allotted 35,18,36,870 equity shares on the conversion of Fully Convertible Warrants. This allotment follows the earlier issuance of 48,08,02,500 warrants by way of preferential allotment. The resolution for the allotment was passed by circulation on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Birla Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange regarding copy of press release issued by the Company w.r.t. the commencement of third line of production at Kundanganj unit in Uttar Pradesh of RCCPL Private Limited, a wholly owned material subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Birla Corporation Limited announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, RCCPL Private Limited, has commissioned a third production line at its Kundanganj grinding unit in Uttar Pradesh. This expansion increases the unit's production capacity by 1.4 million tons. A press release detailing this development has been issued.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: GB Global Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: GB Global Limited has lent Rs. 13,00,00,000 (Rupees Thirteen Crore) to Tangent Profin Private Limited. The company has confirmed that the promoter/promoter group has no interest in this investment. The transaction was conducted on an arm's length basis.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Orient Green Power Company Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Orient Green Power Company Limited has been allotted 61,44,490 equity shares at a face value of Rs. 10 each by its subsidiary, Delta Renewable Energy Private Limited (DELTA). This allotment represents a portion of DELTA's third tranche of a preferential issue. Orient Green Power Company Limited's equity holding in DELTA remains unchanged at 70% subsequent to this allotment.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Capri Global Capital Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Capri Global secures Moody s  Ba3  Ratings and Fitch  BB- ; Signals Strong Credit Strength and Growth Momentum".
announcements.ai_summary: Capri Global Capital Limited announced on March 23, 2026, that it has secured a 'Ba3' Corporate Family Rating from Moody's and a 'BB-' Long-Term Issuer Default Rating from Fitch Ratings. These ratings signal strong credit strength and growth momentum for the NBFC.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: In compliance of Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR ESG score of 60 has been assigned by M/s ESG Risk Assessments & Insights Limited is submitted. The other details given in the attached letter.
announcements.ai_summary: NHPC Limited has received an ESG score of "60" from M/s ESG Risk Assessments & Insights Limited. This score is now available on the websites of BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited. The company has complied with Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR for this disclosure.

announcements.subject: Options to purchase securities
announcements.detail: Akzo Nobel India Limited has informed the Exchange about Options to purchase securities by approving JSW Dulux Limited - Employee Stock Option Scheme, 2026, subject to shareholder approval
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Dulux Limited (formerly Akzo Nobel India Limited) has approved the Employee Stock Option Scheme, 2026. This approval is subject to shareholder consent. The company also appointed two new directors to its Board.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: AWL Agri Business Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: AWL Agri Business Limited (formerly Adani Wilmar Limited) announced that the Ministry of Corporate Affairs approved the strike-off of its subsidiary, AWL Edible Oils and Foods Private Limited. This approval was granted on March 23, 2026, following an application filed by the subsidiary on January 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited has submitted with the Stock Exchange an update on acquisition.
announcements.ai_summary: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited (SAMIL) provided an update on its proposed acquisition of a 28.15% stake in HR Dhauliganga Private Limited (HRDPL). HRDPL is a special purpose vehicle established by Hinduja Renewables Energy Private Limited. This acquisition is related to captive power generation and consumption under Electricity Laws.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: We herewith enclosed the Outcome of the Board Meeting held today i.e March 23, 2026, approving the Proposed acquistion of Avenir International Engineers and Consultants LLC, Abu Dhabi. Detailed letter is enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: SEPC Limited's Board of Directors approved the acquisition of Avenir International Engineers and Consultants LLC, Abu Dhabi. This decision was made during a board meeting held on March 23, 2026. The acquisition is subject to approvals from the company's lenders and shareholders.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Akzo Nobel India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 23, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Dulux Limited (formerly Akzo Nobel India Limited) announced board meeting outcomes on March 23, 2026. The board appointed Mr. Kaustubh Sudhakar Kulkarni as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Non-Independent) and Ms. Sutapa Banerjee as an Additional Director (Independent Woman Director). Both appointments are effective March 23, 2026, and are subject to shareholder approval.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Indo-National Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Revised Unaudited Consolidated Financial Results for the Quarter and HalfYear Ended September 30, 2025'.
announcements.ai_summary: Indo-National Limited has submitted revised Unaudited Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and half-year ended September 30, 2025. An omission occurred during the preparation of the previous statements, specifically the failure to eliminate investments in M/s. Helios Strategic Systems Limited amounting to ₹64.50 Crores. This has been rectified, resulting in a reduction in Non-Current Financial Assets and Total Assets.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Ashoka Buildcon Limited has informed the Exchange about Redemption of Commercial Papers issued by the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Ashoka Buildcon Limited has successfully redeemed its Commercial Papers amounting to ₹50 Crore on the due date, March 23, 2026. The redemption payment, including interest, has been made in full. This disclosure is in accordance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Astral Limited has informed the Exchange about Grant of patent  MULTIPORT WATER OUTLET  to Al-Aziz Plastics Private Limited a wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Astral Limited's wholly-owned subsidiary, Al-Aziz Plastics Private Limited, has been granted a patent by the Government of India for its "MULTIPORT WATER OUTLET" invention. This patent, valid for 20 years from November 01, 2021, relates to a solution for multiple household connections from a single tapping with flexible outlet configurations. The invention aims for cost-efficiency, reduced disruption, and longer main-pipe life.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Solar Industries India Limited has informed the Exchange about Certificate confirming fulfilment of payment obligation with respect to Commercial Paper issued dated December 23, 2025 by Solar Industries India Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Solar Industries India Limited has confirmed the full payment of Rs. 100 Crores for its Commercial Paper issued on December 23, 2025. The payment was made on the due date, March 23, 2026, to Kotak Mahindra Bank Limited. This fulfills the company's payment obligation related to this issuance.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Update under Regulation 30 read with Para A Part A of Schedule III of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Medplus Health Services Limited's subsidiary, Optival Health Solutions Private Limited, has received a suspension order for a Drug License for a store located in Karnataka. This update is provided in accordance with SEBI circulars regarding disclosure requirements. Further details will be available on the company's website and the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Godawari Power And Ispat limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Updates on the Scheme of Amalgamation of Godawari Energy Limited with Godawari Power And Ispat Limited and their eespective Shareholders.'.
announcements.ai_summary: Godawari Power And Ispat Limited has received a certified copy of the National Company Law Tribunal's (NCLT) order dated March 12, 2026, sanctioning the amalgamation of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Godawari Energy Limited, with itself. The order has been filed with the Registrar of Companies, making the scheme effective as of March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Nestle India Limited has informed the Exchange about Update on a one-on-one meet (virtual) with an institutional investor held on 23rd March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Nestle India Limited held a one-on-one virtual meeting with an institutional investor on March 23, 2026. The company has confirmed that no unpublished price sensitive information was shared during this meeting. This update is in reference to their previous letter dated March 9, 2026, and is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: GNG Electronics Limited has informed the Exchange about Execution of Supplemental and Amendatory Agreement with ICICI Bank Limited
announcements.ai_summary: GNG Electronics Limited has entered into a Supplemental and Amendatory Agreement with ICICI Bank Limited on March 10, 2026, to an existing Facility Agreement. The company received this agreement on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Awarding of order(s)/contract(s)
announcements.detail: G R Infraprojects Limited has informed the Exchange about Awarding of order(s)/contract(s)
announcements.ai_summary: G R Infraprojects Limited has been awarded a Letter of Award (LOA) dated March 23, 2026, from the National Highways Authority of India for the "Construction of 4 lane Greenfield Section of NH-33 from Mokama to Munger in the State of Bihar." The contract price for this project is INR 2440.87 Crores, and it is to be completed within 910 days on a Hybrid Annuity Mode.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: NBCC (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation of Work Orders received by NBCC (India) Limited in the ordinary course of business amounting to Rs 58.61 Cr. approx.'.
announcements.ai_summary: NBCC (India) Limited has secured a new work order from Maharaja Sriram Chandra Bhanja Deo University in Mayurbhanj, Odisha. The approximate value of this order is Rs 58.61 crore, excluding GST. This award falls within the ordinary course of the company's business operations.

announcements.subject: Issue of Securities
announcements.detail: Bajaj Finance Limited has informed the Exchange about issue of Securities
announcements.ai_summary: Bajaj Finance Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 23, 2026, approved the issue of 3,472,439 equity shares. These shares will be issued at their respective grant prices to the Trustees of BFL Employee Welfare Trust under the BFL Employee Stock Option Scheme, 2009. The Board meeting commenced at 2:15 p.m. and concluded at 4:10 p.m.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: DMCC SPECIALITY CHEMICALS LIMITED has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: DMCC Speciality Chemicals Limited has been served with a commercial suit filed by Shipping Corporation of India Limited (SCI) in the Hon’ble City Civil Court. The company has provided details as required by SEBI Listing Regulations, stating that these litigations are not expected to materially impact its financial position.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: TREJHARA SOLUTIONS LIMITED has informed the Exchange regarding 'Update on Acquisitions '.
announcements.ai_summary: Trejhara Solutions Limited has completed the acquisition of 100% equity stake in LP Logistics, a Dubai-based entity. LP Logistics will now become a wholly owned subsidiary of Trejhara Solutions Limited. Additionally, the company has set up a joint venture with G S Marketing Associates and concluded the acquisition of its business undertaking.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Setco Automotive Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 23, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Setco Automotive Limited's Board of Directors has approved a draft Scheme of Amalgamation to merge its wholly-owned subsidiary, Lava Cast Private Limited (LCPL), with the company. This merger is subject to approvals from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), shareholders, creditors, and other regulatory authorities.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: PVR INOX Limited has informed the Exchange about opening of 3-screen Multiplex at DLF Midtown Plaza, Moti Nagar, New Delhi.
announcements.ai_summary: PVR INOX Limited has opened a new 3-screen multiplex at DLF Midtown Plaza in Moti Nagar, New Delhi. This expansion brings PVR INOX's total screen count to 1,802 across 360 properties in 114 cities in India and Sri Lanka. The new cinema features advanced projection and sound systems.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation of receipt of ISO 9001:2015 Certification for the Secretarial Function'.
announcements.ai_summary: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Limited's Secretarial Function has received ISO 9001:2015 certification from Bureau Veritas. This certification recognizes the company's robust quality management systems, standardized processes, and commitment to corporate governance and operational excellence.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Wipro Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Wipro Expands Strategic Presence in South Korea, Launches Innovation Lab in Seoul".
announcements.ai_summary: Wipro Limited announced the expansion of its business operations in South Korea, including an enlarged office footprint in Seoul and the launch of a new Innovation Lab. This move reinforces South Korea's role as a strategic growth market for Wipro and enhances its ability to serve local clients.

announcements.company: Gujarat Kidney And Super Speciality Limited
announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Gujarat Kidney And Super Speciality Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat Kidney And Super Speciality Limited has executed the acquisition of Parekhs Hospital Private Limited as its wholly-owned subsidiary on March 22, 2026. Further details as required by SEBI regulations have been provided in an annexure.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hindustan Foods Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "HFL announces acquisition of Beauty Care and Cosmetic products manufacturing business .
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Foods Limited (HFL) has announced the acquisition of a Beauty Care and Cosmetic products manufacturing business through a Business Transfer Agreement. This acquisition is being made by HFL, which is a Vanity Case Group Company. Further details of the acquisition are provided in a press release dated March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Fineotex Chemical Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates on the Plant Visit scheduled to be held on Tuesday, March 24, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Fineotex Chemical Limited will host an investor and analyst plant visit on Tuesday, March 24, 2026, at its Ambernath plant in Maharashtra. The visit will include representatives from various firms such as Mili Capital, Prad Capital, and Fort Capital. No price-sensitive information will be discussed during the visit.

announcements.subject: Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.detail: Puravankara Limited has informed the Exchange about Corporate Guarantee given on behalf of Pune Projects LLP in favour of RBL Bank Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Puravankara Limited has provided a Corporate Guarantee of Rs. 50,00,00,000 (Fifty Crores Rupees) on behalf of Pune Projects LLP in favour of RBL Bank Limited. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Limited shareholders have approved the transfer of a business undertaking to its subsidiary, Mahindra Blossom Developers Limited, on a slump sale basis. The resolutions were passed by the requisite majority via postal ballot, with the voting results declared on March 23, 2026.

announcements.company: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited
announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited has informed the Exchange that the Company has achieved the requisite Minimum Public Shareholding through the recently concluded Offer for Sale on 19/03/2026 of 26,38,747 equity shares by the Promoters of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited has achieved the required Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS). This was accomplished through an Offer for Sale on March 19, 2026, where promoters sold 26,38,747 equity shares. The company's revised shareholding now stands at 89.90% for promoters and 10.10% for the public.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hind Rectifiers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "HIRECT Announces Availability of Advanced Copper Conductors forHigh-Power Transformers from Expanded India Facility".
announcements.ai_summary: Hind Rectifiers Limited (HIRECT) has announced the commercial availability of advanced copper products, including Continuously Transposed Conductors (CTC), Paper Insulated Copper Conductors (PICC), and Enameled Paper Insulated Copper Conductors (EPICC). These products are manufactured at their newly inaugurated state-of-the-art copper processing plant in Nashik, India, and will be exported globally for high-power transformers and wound components.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: LTM Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "LTM Expands BlueVerseTM Tech with AppIQ, AgentIQ and FusionIQ to Accelerate AI-Led Engineering".
announcements.ai_summary: LTIMindtree Limited announced the expansion of its AI-led engineering platform, BlueVerseTM Tech. This expansion includes the launch of three new purpose-built platforms: AppIQ, AgentIQ, and FusionIQ. These platforms are designed to help enterprises modernize applications, manage AI-first software delivery, and engineer quality at scale. The announcement was made on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Press Release in connection with Joint venture project ".
announcements.ai_summary: Bosch Limited and Tata AutoComp Systems Limited have announced a joint venture to accelerate future growth in e-mobility. This announcement follows their earlier joint venture agreement dated March 18, 2026. The press release regarding this joint venture was issued on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has completed the acquisition of an additional 30.58% equity stake in its subsidiary, Apollo Health and Lifestyle Limited (AHLL). The transaction involved acquiring 41,650,638 equity shares from International Finance Corporation and IFC EAF Apollo Investment Company for Rs. 12,540.68 million. Following this acquisition, Apollo Hospitals' effective shareholding in AHLL has increased to 99.42%.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited Has Informed the Exchange About Publication of Case Study and Case Reports.
announcements.ai_summary: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited has announced the publication of academic case studies and case reports in the "International Journal of Advanced Research (IJAR)". These publications, authored by medical professionals associated with the company, including its Managing Director and senior consultants, highlight the company's commitment to Ayurvedic research and evidence-based clinical practice.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Bharti Airtel Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Airtel brings faster speeds and wider 5G coverage to millions in Gujarat with 2,750+ new sites".
announcements.ai_summary: Bharti Airtel Limited has issued a press release announcing the deployment of over 2,750 new 5G sites across Gujarat in the last 12 months. This expansion aims to provide faster speeds, wider coverage, and an improved network experience for millions of customers in 36 districts.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hindustan Zinc Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Hindustan Zinc and Tata Steel Partner to Scale Low-Carbon ZincSolutions with EcoZen".
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Zinc Limited and Tata Steel are partnering to scale low-carbon zinc solutions with a product called EcoZen. This collaboration aims to reduce value-chain emissions, as EcoZen offers over 75% lower carbon intensity than conventional zinc. The partnership builds on a long-standing relationship supporting critical infrastructure projects.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Update regarding Investment in the share capital of Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the company
announcements.ai_summary: Transrail Lighting Limited has recalled share application money remitted for its wholly-owned subsidiary, Transrail Trading LLC in the UAE. This decision was made due to the current war-like situation.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: COMPLIANCE WITH REGULATION 30 OF SEBI (LODR) REGULATIONS, 2015 - FUNDING OF  06TH SEMI ANNUAL INTEREST PAYMENT IN ESCROW ACCOUNT MAINTAINED IN BANK OF INDIA WRT MTNL BOND SERIES VII E (INE153A08147)
announcements.ai_summary: Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Limited has funded the 6th semi-annual interest payment for its MTNL Bond Series VII E (INE153A08147) into an escrow account maintained with Bank of India. The funding was completed on March 21, 2026, for the interest payment due on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Limited has informed the Exchange about Allotment of 3,000 Non Convertible Debentures on Private Placement basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Limited has approved the allotment of 3,000 Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis. Each NCD has a face value of INR 1,00,000 and was issued at INR 98,000.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Hari Shanker Khemka For and on behalf of Hari Khemka Business Family Trust has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Hari Shanker Khemka, on behalf of the Hari Khemka Business Family Trust, has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10(5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to a substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Urvashi Tilakdhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Urvashi Tilakdhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Urvashi Tilakdhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Urvashi Tilakdhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Akshay Dhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Akshay Dhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Allied Blenders and Distillers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "ICONiQ White Whisky Makes History: World s Fastest Growing MillionaireSpirits Brand Crosses 10 Million Cases Milestone.".
announcements.ai_summary: Allied Blenders and Distillers Limited has issued a press release announcing that its ICONiQ White Whisky has crossed the 10 million cases milestone. The brand is described as the world's fastest-growing millionaire spirits brand. The press release is dated March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Shalby Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Inaugurationof Oncology Department along with advanced Radiotherapy facilities at Krishna Shalby Hospital'.
announcements.ai_summary: Shalby Limited has inaugurated an Oncology Department with advanced Radiotherapy facilities at Krishna Shalby Hospital in Ahmedabad. This expansion aims to provide comprehensive, integrated cancer care under one roof. The department is equipped with advanced technology and an experienced team of oncologists for specialized diagnosis and treatment.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Gudhi Padwa sales update for the Financial Year 2025-2026.
announcements.ai_summary: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Limited reported a significant increase in Gudhi Padwa sales for FY 2025-2026, reaching Rs. 73.004 million. This represents a 2.51 times year-on-year growth compared to Rs. 20.818 million in the previous year's Gudhi Padwa sales.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Vintage Coffee And Beverages Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Commencement of commercial production of 4,500 MTPA".
announcements.ai_summary: Vintage Coffee And Beverages Limited announced the commencement of commercial production for an additional 4,500 MTPA capacity on March 23, 2026. This brownfield expansion for soluble coffee is located at a wholly-owned subsidiary's facility near Rachur Village, Telangana, increasing the company's total installed production capacity.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Euro Pratik Sales Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition of Chawla Brothers
announcements.ai_summary: Euro Pratik Sales Limited's Board of Directors approved the acquisition of a 51% stake in Chawla Brothers, a partnership firm based in Jalandhar and Ludhiana. The total investment for this acquisition amounts to Rs. 32.20 crore.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: IFGL Refractories Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: IFGL Refractories Limited has resumed operations at its Kandla manufacturing facility in Gujarat. The facility, located at Plot Nos. 638-644, Kandla Special Economic Zone, had been impacted by Liquified Petroleum Gas (LPG) supply issues. All product lines at the Kandla works are now functional.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Adani Green Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Operationalization of Projects'.
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Green Energy Limited (AGEL) has operationalized an aggregate of 510.1 MW power projects at Khavda, Gujarat, through its stepdown subsidiaries. This commissioning has increased AGEL’s total operational renewable generation capacity to 17,982.3 MW. The decision to operationalize these plants and commence power generation was made on March 22, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Goa Carbon Limited has informed the Exchange about the temporary shut-down of the Company's Paradeep Unit for scheduled maintenance work.
announcements.ai_summary: Goa Carbon Limited has temporarily shut down its Paradeep Unit for scheduled maintenance work. The unit is located at Vill. Udayabata, Paradeepgarh, Dist. Jagatsinghpur, Odisha. The shutdown commenced on March 22, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Kirloskar Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Update of Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL), a listed material subsidiary of the Company'.
announcements.ai_summary: Kirloskar Industries Limited has informed the exchange about an update from its material subsidiary, Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL). KFIL, a listed entity, has filed an intimation with the stock exchanges where its shares are listed. A copy of KFIL's intimation is enclosed for reference.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: RITES Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: RITES Limited has received a Letter of Acceptance from Research Designs and Standards Organisation (RDSO), Lucknow. The contract is for the comprehensive maintenance of a dedicated test track between Gudha and Thathana Mithri stations in the Jodhpur division of NWR.

announcements.subject: Bhageria Industries Ltd - 530803 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Update
announcements.detail: 7 MW Solar Power Project commissioned under the MSKVY 2.0
announcements.ai_summary: Bhageria Industries Limited's wholly owned subsidiary, Rahuri Cleantech Private Limited, has successfully commissioned a 7 MW Solar Photovoltaic (PV) Power Plant located at Bhatkudgaon, Taluka Shevgaon, District Ahilyanagar, Maharashtra, on March 27, 2026. This commissioning is part of the aggregate 32 MW capacity being developed under the Mukhyamantri Saur Krushi Vahini Yojana (MSKVY) 2.0 scheme. The project is grid-connected and is now operational. The commissioning of this solar power plant enhances Bhageria Industries' renewable energy portfolio and supports its sustainability initiatives.

announcements.subject: Bharti Airtel Ltd - 532454 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements), Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements), Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Bharti Airtel Ltd has received a notice from the Department of Telecommunications (DoT) imposing a penalty of Rs.174,000. This penalty stems from alleged violations of subscriber verification norms, identified during a sample Customer Application Form Audit conducted by the DoT for January 2026. The company is obligated under its license agreement to ensure adequate verification of customers. Bharti Airtel Limited received this communication on March 27, 2026. The company is currently reviewing the details of the alleged contraventions.

announcements.subject: Sagar Cements Ltd-$ - 502090 - Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: The Exchange has received the Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 on March 26, 2026 for Sreekanth Reddy Sammidi
announcements.ai_summary:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding "Opening of New Branches"
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Limited will be opening two new branches on March 30, 2026. The first branch will be located at Sri Basawa Square, Gandhi Nagar 2nd Cross, Ballari, Karnataka -583 101. The second branch will be situated at S.No.2739, T.P.No.2, Plot No.417, Shop No.G/4,G/5,G/6,Ground Floor “Radhasoami Sulay” Opp to Fire Station Sardar Gunj, Baliyadev Chowkdi,Vyayam Shala Road Anand, Gujarat – 388 001. Additionally, a third branch will open at No.8/139 A3, Sooranayakkanpatti Street, Pandalkudi, Aruppukottai Taluk Virudhunagar District, Tamilnadu – 626 113. This expansion is in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Bharti Hexacom Ltd - 544162 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: The Department of Telecommunications (DoT) has issued a notice to Bharti Hexacom Ltd imposing a penalty of Rs.264,000. This penalty is for alleged violations of subscriber verification norms as identified during a Customer Application Form Audit for the quarter ending December 2025. The company is required to ensure adequate customer verification before enrolling subscribers as per its license agreement. Bharti Hexacom Limited received this notice on March 27, 2026. The company is evaluating the details of the alleged violations.

announcements.subject: Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd - 544344 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Amendments to Memorandum & Articles of Association
announcements.detail: Certificate of registration of the Special Resolution confirming alteration of Object Clause (s)
announcements.ai_summary: Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd has officially altered its Memorandum of Association (MOA) by substituting the existing sub-clause (1) of Clause III with a new sub-clause (1) of Clause III(A). This alteration was approved by the company's shareholders through a special resolution via postal ballot. The Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) has confirmed this change, issuing a certificate of alteration on March 27, 2026. The updated MOA now encompasses a broader scope for the company's business, including the design, development, manufacturing, assembly, and dealing in a wide array of automotive and engine components, such as pistons, piston rings, cylinder liners, engine valves, gaskets, and various types of gears. This expansion also covers components for internal combustion engines, steam engines, compressors, and other machinery, reflecting a strategic move to broaden its operational activities.

announcements.subject: Bajaj Hindusthan Sugar Ltd - 500032 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of 988937706 Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares (CCPS) of face value of Rs.1/- each at par on preferential basis on conversion of loan in accordance with the Framework Agreement executed on March 26, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bajaj Hindusthan Sugar Ltd has allotted 98,89,37,706 Series A 0.01% Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares (CCPS) of face value of Re. 1/- each, at par, on a preferential basis. This allotment, aggregating to Rs. 98.89 Crores, is a conversion of loan in accordance with the "Resolution Plan" and a Framework Agreement executed on March 26, 2026. The Committee of Directors approved this allotment in a meeting held on March 28, 2026, which commenced at 12:45 P.M. and concluded at 01:00 P.M. The allotment for one remaining lender will be completed upon their loan conversion process.

announcements.subject: Glen Industries Ltd - 544444 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Intimation under Reglation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015 - Acquisition of Shares by Promoter and Promoter Group
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Glen Industries Limited has announced that Lalit Agrawal (HUF), part of the Promoter Group, acquired 1,200 equity shares of the company on March 27, 2026. The acquisition was made from public shareholders at a prevailing market price of Rs. 65/- per share, aggregating to Rs. 78,000.00/-. Following this acquisition, the total shareholding of the Promoter and Promoter Group has increased from 73.42% to 73.43% of the total paid-up equity share capital. This acquisition was completed in compliance with minimum public shareholding requirements.

announcements.subject: Avantel Ltd - 532406 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of Supply Order worth of Rs.137.12 Cr from the India Meteorological Department, Ministry of Earth Sciences, Government of India
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Avantel Limited has received a Supply Order worth Rs. 137.12 Crores (exclusive of taxes) from the India Meteorological Department, Ministry of Earth Sciences, Government of India. The order is for the supply, warranty, and comprehensive annual maintenance contract (COAMC) of seven (7) Wind Profiler Systems. The order includes a 5% Performance Bank Guarantee, a three (3) year warranty, and seven (7) years of COAMC. The execution of this order is expected by September 2027.

announcements.subject: Standard Engineering Technology Ltd - 544333 - Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: The Exchange has received the Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 on March 28, 2026 for Katragadda Venkata Ramani
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: The Exchange has received disclosures regarding the reasons for encumbrance by promoter Katragadda Venkata Ramani. These disclosures are made under Regulation 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, and were received on March 28, 2026.

announcements.subject: NTPC Ltd - 532555 - Investment Approval For Battery Energy Storage System
announcements.detail: Disclosure attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: NTPC Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 28, 2026, approved an investment proposal for a Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) with a total capacity of 4.70 GWh, at an estimated project cost of Rs. 5,821.90 Crore. This investment signifies a strategic expansion into energy storage solutions. The board meeting commenced at 11:10 A.M. and concluded at 12:15 P.M.

announcements.subject: Senores Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 544319 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On March 28, 2026
announcements.detail: Senores Pharmaceuticals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding outcome of Board meeting held on March 28, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Senores Pharmaceuticals Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 28, 2026, approved the allotment of 11,70,000 warrants convertible into equity shares. Each warrant carries the right to subscribe to one equity share at an exercise price of ₹812/- per warrant. The company has received ₹203/- per warrant, which is 25% of the issue price, amounting to ₹23,75,10,000/- as warrant subscription price from the allottees. The total value of the warrants, upon full exercise, will aggregate to ₹95,00,40,000/-. These warrants are allotted on a preferential basis and will be subject to lock-in restrictions as per SEBI ICDR Regulations. The board meeting commenced at 11:45 A.M. and concluded at 12:07 P.M.

announcements.subject: Sayaji Hotels (Indore) Ltd - 544080 - Intimation For Sale Of Equity Shares By The Promoter Under Sr. No. 7 (Ii) Of SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/Pod2/P/CIR/2023/18 Dated February 03, 2023 Of Manner Of Achieving Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS)
announcements.detail: Intimation for sale of Equity shares by M/s MP Entertainment and Developers Private Limited, part of the Promoter Group, pursuant to the compliance of MPS Requirements.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sayaji Hotels (Indore) Limited has provided prior intimation regarding the sale of equity shares by M/s MP Entertainment and Developers Private Limited, a part of the Promoter Group. This sale is intended to comply with Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS) requirements, as the promoter group's shareholding increased beyond permissible limits due to an Open Offer by Century 21 Officespace Private Limited. The sale will be conducted in the open market to ensure the company maintains the prescribed public shareholding levels as per SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/P/CIR/2023/18 dated February 03, 2023. The company had attempted to upload this intimation on the previous day but faced a technical failure.

announcements.subject: Cords Cable Industries Ltd - 532941 - Intimation Of Inclusion Of Naveen Sawhney HUF In Promoter Group
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Reg 30 and other applicable provisions of SEBI (LODR) Reg, 2015, We hereby inform you that Naveen Sawhney HUF represented by its Karta Mr. Naveen Sawhney, Promoter of the company has been included in the "Promoter Group" of  the company.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Cords Cable Industries Limited has announced the inclusion of Naveen Sawhney HUF, represented by its Karta Mr. Naveen Sawhney, into the "Promoter Group" of the company. This inclusion is in accordance with the definition of "Promoter Group" under SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018. Naveen Sawhney HUF holds 12,700 equity shares, representing 0.098% of the company's total voting capital, as of March 27, 2026. This inclusion does not result in any change in the control or management of the company.

announcements.subject: Crizac Ltd - 544439 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release titled "Strategic in-house development of AI-based Education Technology Platform"
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Crizac Limited is strategically developing an AI-based Education Technology Platform named EduMentor through in-house development, committing $2.5 million over a five-year roadmap. This initiative aims to integrate AI and machine learning to create a structured, AI-driven mentorship marketplace connecting prospective students with verified mentors globally. The project is being steered by Chairman and Managing Director Dr. Vikash Agarwal and will be developed under the leadership of IIM Calcutta alumnus Mr. Dishant Kharbanda, who brings nearly two decades of edtech experience. This development signifies Crizac's mission to lead innovation and dominate the Edtech industry.

announcements.subject: Tata Steel Ltd - 500470 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Read With Regulation 51 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulations 30 and 51 of SEBI Listing Regulations
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Steel Limited has received an order from the Hon’ble Revisional Authority, Ministry of Coal, Government of India, dated March 24, 2026, which was received on March 27, 2026. This order relates to Revision Applications (Nos. 38, 39, and 40 of 2026) filed by Tata Steel Limited challenging demand notices issued by the District Mining Officer, Dhanbad, Jharkhand. The aggregate demand was ₹385.19 crore, alleging excess coal production beyond permissible limits at its collieries in Jharia, Jharkhand, during FY2000-01 to FY2016-17. The Hon’ble Revisional Authority has admitted the Revision Applications for consideration and has directed the State Authorities of Jharkhand not to take any coercive steps against the Company during the pendency of these applications.

announcements.subject: Real Touch Finance Ltd - 538611 - Board Meeting Outcome for Allotment Of Non Convertible Debenture (Ncds)
announcements.detail: we wish to inform you that the Board of Directors of the Company, vide their resolution passed by circulation today, i.e. Saturday, March 28, 2026, have approved the allotment of 256 Secured, Unlisted, Unrated, Redeemable, Fully Paid Non-Convertible Debentures, of face value of Rs. 1,00,000/- each at an issue price of Rs. 1,00,000/- each aggregating to INR 2,56,00,000 (Rupees Two Crores Fifty-Six Lakhs Only) on Private Placement basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Real Touch Finance Ltd. has approved the allotment of 256 Secured, Unlisted, Unrated, Redeemable, Fully Paid Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis. Each NCD has a face value of Rs. 1,00,000/- and was issued at the same price, aggregating to INR 2,56,00,000 (Rupees Two Crores Fifty-Six Lakhs Only). This allotment was approved by the Board of Directors via a resolution passed by circulation on March 28, 2026. This issuance is part of the company's fundraising strategy.

announcements.subject: CIAN Agro Industries & Infrastructure Ltd - 519477 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: CIAN has acquired M/s. Shubhada Tool Industries Private Limited through IBC. Hon''ble National Company Law Tribunal Mumbai Bench has pronounced the order on 24th March, 2026 for approval of resolution plan submitted by CIAN.
announcements.ai_summary: CIAN Agro Industries & Infrastructure Ltd. has successfully acquired M/s. Shubhada Tool Industries Private Limited through the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (IBC) process. The Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, approved CIAN's resolution plan on March 24, 2026. Shubhada Tool Industries Private Limited is engaged in the manufacturing of hand tools with a capacity of 300 MT per month. The company is awaiting the certified copy of the NCLT order, which will be submitted upon receipt.

announcements.subject: KNR Constructions Ltd - 532942 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of letter of award
announcements.ai_summary: KNR Constructions Ltd. has received a Letter of Award (LOA) from the National Highways Authority of India on March 27, 2026, for the construction of a 4-laning project. The project involves upgrading NH-167 from Gudebellur to Mahabubnagar in Telangana, covering a length of 80.01 km. The bid project cost for this contract is Rs. 1734.00 Crores. The project will be executed on a Hybrid Annuity Mode (HAM), with a construction period of 730 days and an operation period of 15 years from the Commercial Operation Date (COD).

announcements.subject: Gujarat Ambuja Exports Ltd - 524226 - Commencement Of Commercial Production Of New Maltodextrin Facility At Hubli, Karnataka
announcements.detail: Intimation for Commencement of Commercial Production of New Maltodextrin Facility at Hubli, Karnataka.
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat Ambuja Exports Ltd. has successfully commenced commercial production at its new Maltodextrin facility in Hubli, Karnataka, effective March 28, 2026. This expansion increases the company's total installed capacity for Maltodextrin production at Hubli from 7,000 MTPA to 23,000 MTPA. This development is in line with the company's growth strategy and is expected to enhance its market presence in the Maltodextrin segment.

announcements.subject: Tarc Ltd - 543249 - Intimation Of Payment Of Interest On Ncds
announcements.detail: Intimation of payment of interest on NCDs.
announcements.ai_summary: TARC Limited has confirmed the payment of interest on its Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) with ISIN INE0EK9G0TO5O. The company made an interest payment of Rs. 68,62,39,323 on March 27, 2026, which was the actual payment date, falling before the due date of March 31, 2026. The total issue size of these NCDs was Rs. 409,00,00,000. This payment is being made on a quarterly basis.

announcements.subject: India Finsec Ltd - 535667 - Revised Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: The Exchange has received the revised Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 on March 20, 2026 for Gopal Bansal HUF
announcements.ai_summary: The promoter, Gopal Bansal HUF, has submitted revised disclosures regarding the reasons for encumbrance of shares. This submission is in accordance with Regulation 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The revised disclosures were filed on March 20, 2026. Investors should monitor any further updates or implications arising from these revised disclosures.

announcements.subject: Nilachal Refractories Ltd - 502294 - Draft Letter of Offer
announcements.detail: Narnolia Financial Services Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Draft Letter of Offer for the attention of the Equity Shareholders of Nilachal Refractories Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Narnolia Financial Services Ltd, acting as the Manager to the Offer, has submitted a Draft Letter of Offer to BSE for the attention of the Equity Shareholders of Nilachal Refractories Limited. The offer is being made by SFAL Speciality Alloys Limited, the Acquirer, to acquire up to 59,83,928 Equity Shares of Nilachal Refractories Limited. The offer price for each equity share is ₹ 22.00, and these shares represent 29.39% of the total voting share capital. The equity shares to be acquired have a face value of ₹ 10/- each. This open offer is being made in accordance with regulations 16(1) and 18(1) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The Draft Letter of Offer is intended to inform public shareholders about the terms of the acquisition.

announcements.subject: Moschip Technologies Ltd - 532407 - NCLT Hyderabad Approval For Scheme Of Amalgamation Of Softnautics Inc And Softnautics Private Limited With Moschip Technologies Limited.
announcements.detail: Receipt of NCLT Hyderabad order approving  Scheme of Amalgamation of Softnautics Inc and Softnautics Private Limited with MosChip Technologies Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Moschip Technologies Limited has received a certified true copy of the order from the Hon’ble NCLT, Hyderabad Bench, approving the Scheme of Amalgamation. This scheme involves the amalgamation of Softnautics Private Limited and Softnautics Inc, which are wholly owned subsidiaries, with Moschip Technologies Limited. The NCLT's approval was granted by its order dated March 25, 2026. The amalgamation is effective from the appointed date of April 04, 2025. Moschip Technologies Limited had previously submitted the required disclosure to the stock exchanges on April 08, 2025, as per SEBI Master Circular SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024. The company has enclosed the NCLT order as "Annexure – A" for the records of the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Thermax Ltd - 500411 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Thermax Limited has submitted Press Release regarding conclusion of order by its wholly owned subsidiary
announcements.ai_summary: Thermax Limited's wholly owned subsidiary, Thermax Babcock & Wilcox Energy Solutions Limited (TBWES), has secured a significant boiler package supply order valued at approximately Rs. 1,600 crore. This order is for a 1x800 MW ultra-supercritical thermal power plant being developed by a leading thermal power projects company in Central India. The scope of work encompasses manufacturing, supply, installation supervision, commissioning, and performance testing of the boiler package. The execution of this order will be managed in alignment with the project milestones and delivery schedules stipulated in the contract. This order represents a breakthrough for Thermax, reinforcing its expertise in large-scale energy solutions and its commitment to delivering projects with accelerated timelines and successful execution.

announcements.subject: Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd - 544407 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015- Execution Of Share Purchase Agreements And Shareholders Agreement
announcements.detail: Intimation is attached
announcements.ai_summary: Aegis Vopak Terminals Limited has executed a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA 1) and a Shareholders' Agreement with Itochu Corporation and its subsidiary, Aegis Terminal (Pipavav) Limited (ATPL), on March 27, 2026. Through this agreement, Aegis Vopak Terminals Limited will sell 10% of the equity stake in ATPL, representing 5,000 equity shares of INR 10 each, to Itochu Corporation for an aggregate consideration of INR 80,32,00,000 (Indian Rupees Eighty Crores Thirty Two lakhs Only). Following this transaction, Aegis Vopak Terminals Limited will continue to hold an 86% equity stake in ATPL, down from its current 96%. The agreement includes significant terms such as special rights for Itochu, including the right to appoint directors and a first right to share subscription, and indemnification clauses for Aegis Vopak Terminals Limited.

announcements.subject: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd - 524715 - Updates On Fibromun And Nidlegy
announcements.detail: Updates on Fibromun and Nidlegy
announcements.ai_summary: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Limited has provided clinical updates on its drug candidates, Fibromun and Nidlegy, from its partner Philogen. The Phase II FLASH study for Fibromun in soft tissue sarcoma did not meet its primary endpoint for Progression Free Survival (PFS). Similarly, the Phase II GLIOSTAR trial for glioblastoma also did not meet its primary endpoint, although an improvement in survival was observed in a subgroup of patients with limited exposure to alkylating agents. The company remains committed to the GLIOSUN trial for treatment-naïve glioblastoma patients, which is initiating its dose expansion phase, and the GLIOSTELLA study, which is expected to report survival data in September 2026. Following encouraging signals from the FIBROSARC study, a request for Parallel Scientific Advice with the FDA and EMA has been submitted to define the design of a new Phase III registrational study, FIBROSARC-2, planned to start in the second quarter of 2026.

announcements.subject: Cigniti Technologies Ltd - 534758 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 -Reservation Of Order Of Second Motion Petition By The Hon'Ble National Company Law Tribunal ('NCLT')
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30
announcements.ai_summary: Cigniti Technologies Limited has announced that the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) has reserved its order for formal pronouncement regarding the proposed Scheme of Amalgamation of Cigniti Technologies Limited with and into Coforge Limited. This reservation of order took place on March 27, 2026. The statutory authorities have also indicated their no-objection to the sanctioning of the Scheme. Cigniti Technologies Limited, which is a Coforge Company, had previously made several disclosures related to this amalgamation, starting from December 27, 2024. The company will provide further notification to the stock exchanges and update its website once the NCLT order is received.

announcements.company: Swan Defence And Heavy Industries Ltd
announcements.subject: Swan Defence And Heavy Industries Ltd - 533107 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR) - General Updates
announcements.detail: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited has informed the exchange that the Company, on 27th March, 2026 has concluded making full and final repayment to all Committee of Creditors'' members, in accordance with the Resolution Plan pursuant to the NCLT Order dated 23.12.2022.
announcements.ai_summary: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited has completed the full and final repayment to all members of the Committee of Creditors (CoC) on March 27, 2026. This repayment was made in accordance with the Resolution Plan approved by the NCLT Order dated December 23, 2022. The company, formerly known as Reliance Naval and Engineering Limited, has fulfilled its obligations under the resolution plan.

announcements.subject: Sammaan Capital Ltd - 535789 - Receipt Of All Regulatory Approvals For The Proposed Transaction - Preferential Issue Of Equity Shares And Warrants
announcements.detail:
We wish to inform that all regulatory approvals have now been received with respect to the proposed acquisition of controlling stake in Sammaan Capital Limited by Avenir Investment RSC Limited which is owned and controlled by International Holding Company PJSC. The Company and the Investor are now engaged to conclude the Proposed Transaction at the earliest.

Refer attached PDF for more details.
announcements.ai_summary: Sammaan Capital Limited has announced that all regulatory approvals have been received for the proposed acquisition of a controlling stake by Avenir Investment RSC Limited, which is owned by International Holding Company PJSC. This transaction involves a preferential issue of equity shares and warrants. The Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) has approved applications made by Sammaan Asset Management Limited (SAML), a wholly-owned subsidiary, under the SEBI (Portfolio Managers) Regulations, 2020, and SEBI (Alternative Investment Funds) Regulations, 2012. The investor, Avenir Investment RSC Ltd, proposes to invest approximately INR 8,849,99,99,794/-. Upon completion of the preferential issue, the investor is expected to hold approximately 41.2% of the company's paid-up equity share capital, potentially increasing to 63.3% after an open offer. The company and the investor are now working to conclude the transaction.

announcements.subject: Coforge Ltd - 532541 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 - Reservation Of Order Of Second Motion Petition By The Hon'Ble National Company Law Tribunal ('NCLT')
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30
announcements.ai_summary: Coforge Limited has announced that the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) has reserved its order for formal pronouncement concerning the proposed Scheme of Amalgamation of Cigniti Technologies Limited with and into Coforge Limited. This reservation of order occurred on March 27, 2026. The statutory authorities have also recorded their no-objection to the sanctioning of the Scheme. Coforge Limited had previously made several disclosures regarding this amalgamation, starting from December 27, 2024. The company will further notify the stock exchanges and make the information available on its website upon receipt of the copy of the NCLT order.

announcements.subject: One 97 Communications Ltd - 543396 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Loan waiver by other Shareholder in First Games Technology Private Limited; no financial impact on the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: The step-down subsidiary of One 97 Communications Limited, First Games Technology Private Limited (FGTPL), has had its outstanding loan of approximately ₹142 Crore, including accrued interest, waived by its shareholder, AGTech Media Holdings Limited. This waiver was approved by FGTPL's Board on March 27, 2026. FGTPL had previously discontinued its real money gaming business due to regulatory changes. One 97 Communications Limited had already fully impaired its investment and shareholder loan related to FGTPL, therefore, this loan waiver will have no adverse financial impact on the company. The disclosure was made on March 27, 2026, and the details are available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: UNO Minda Ltd-$ - 532539 - Disclosure Under Sub-Para 20 Of Para A Of Part A Of Schedule III Of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 Related To Subsidiary Company
announcements.detail: Please Refer the attached file for disclosure of penalty order received by Subsidiary Company
announcements.ai_summary: Minda Westport Technologies Limited (MWTL), a subsidiary of Uno Minda Limited, has received an order from the Principal Commissioner of Customs (ICD Patparganj), New Delhi, on March 27, 2026. The order pertains to the CTH/HSN misclassification of imported components used in vehicle CNG systems. MWTL has been demanded to pay ₹25,56,79,094/- as tax and an equal amount as penalty, plus applicable interest. MWTL disagrees with the order and plans to file an appeal. The company does not foresee any material impact on its financial or operational activities.

announcements.subject: Windsor Machines Ltd - 522029 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed the intimation for allotment of equity shares on conversion of equity warrants as per SEBI ICDR Regulations and SEBI Listing Regulations
announcements.ai_summary: Windsor Machines Limited has approved the allotment of 7,00,000 equity shares on conversion of 7,00,000 equity warrants. The conversion price is ₹191.85 per share, including a premium of ₹189.85 per share. This transaction involved the Promoter Group, specifically Mr. Rameshbhai Keshubhai Siyani, who exercised his rights to convert warrants upon payment of ₹10,07,21,250.00, representing 75% of the issue price per warrant. Following this allotment, Mr. Rameshbhai Keshubhai Siyani holds 45,12,405 warrants pending conversion. The Board of Directors passed a circular resolution on Friday, March 27, 2026, approving this allotment.

announcements.subject: HealthCare Global Enterprises Ltd - 539787 - Outcome Of Rights Issue Committee- March 27, 2026
announcements.detail: The Rights Issue Committee at its meeting held today, i.e., March 27, 2026, inter alia, considered and approved the allotment of 82,94,566 Equity Shares of Face Value of Rs. 10 each on Rights Basis to the eligible shareholders and/or renouncee(s) in terms of Letter of Offer dated February 24, 2026, at a price of Rs. 512 per Equity Share (including premium of Rs. 502 per Equity Share).
announcements.ai_summary: HealthCare Global Enterprises Ltd. has approved the allotment of 82,94,566 Equity Shares, each with a Face Value of Rs. 10, on a rights basis. The allotment was made to eligible shareholders and/or renouncee(s) at a price of Rs. 512 per Equity Share, which includes a premium of Rs. 502 per Equity Share. This decision was made by the Rights Issue Committee at its meeting held on March 27, 2026. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased from Rs. 141,00,76,370 (14,10,07,637 shares) to Rs. 149,30,22,030 (14,93,02,203 shares).

announcements.subject:
Reliance Communications Ltd - 532712 - Intimation In Accordance With Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of
India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation in accordance with Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing and Disclosure Requirement) Regulations 2015 related to Central Bureau of Investigation visit on 26th March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Reliance Communications Limited has informed the exchanges that officials from the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) conducted a search and seizure operation at the office premises of Reliance Telecom Limited (RTL), a wholly owned subsidiary of the company. The operation took place on March 26, 2026, at RTL's office located in Navi Mumbai. The company and RTL are continuing to operate their businesses as usual. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Titagarh Rail Systems Ltd - 532966 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting held today i.e. 27th March, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: The Board of Directors of Titagarh Rail Systems Limited (TRSL) met on March 27, 2026, and approved the sale of its entire 100% shareholding in Titagarh Singapore Pte. Limited (TSPL), a wholly owned subsidiary. This sale is subject to necessary approvals and is governed by the terms of a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) dated March 27, 2026, executed with Worldvmc Singapore Pte. Limited (WSPL). TSPL, incorporated in 2008 for overseas business expansion, has remained dormant and is not part of TRSL's current strategic vision. Upon completion, TSPL will cease to be a subsidiary of TRSL.

announcements.subject: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd - 524715 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Limited has announced that it will present 14 abstracts at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting, scheduled from March 27 to March 31, 2026, in Denver, Colorado. These presentations will highlight advances in Alopecia Areata, Psoriasis, and Acne research, underscoring the company's expertise in dermatology and immunology. Notable presentations include data from a Phase 3b study evaluating ILUMYA® (tildrakizumab-asmn) for moderate-to-severe psoriasis affecting the nails. The data aims to demonstrate the company's commitment to developing safe and effective medications for patients with chronic dermatological conditions.

announcements.subject: Markolines Pavement Technologies Ltd - 543364 - General Updates As To Scheme Of Amalgamation Documents Filed By The Company.
announcements.detail: General updates as to Scheme of Amalgamation documents filed by the Company with BSE and NSE
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Markolines Pavement Technologies Limited has provided an update regarding its Scheme of Amalgamation with Markolines Infra Limited. The company has filed the necessary documents with both the BSE and NSE. In a clarification, the company corrected an inadvertent clerical error in its previous board meeting outcome dated March 6, 2026. Sobhagya Capital Options Private Limited, a SEBI registered Category I Merchant Banker, has issued a fairness opinion stating that the Share Exchange Ratio is financially fair. The name Aftertrade Broking Private Limited was mistakenly mentioned instead of Sobhagya Capital Options Private Limited.

announcements.subject: Suditi Industries Ltd - 521113 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation30 of SEBI(LODR) Regulations, 2015, we wish to update that the Company has successfully completed the acquisition of 50% equity shareholding in SAA & Suditi Retail Private Limited. Consequent to this acquisition,  SAA & Suditi Retail Private Limited has become wholly owned subsidiary of Suditi Industries Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Suditi Industries Limited has successfully completed the acquisition of 50% equity shareholding in SAA & Suditi Retail Private Limited. This acquisition was made from Project Anushka Sharma Lifestyles Private Limited on an arm's length basis, based on an independent valuation report. As a result of this transaction, SAA & Suditi Retail Private Limited has now become a wholly-owned subsidiary of Suditi Industries Limited. The acquired entity is involved in the manufacturing of all types of textile garments and clothing accessories.

announcements.subject: Swan Corp Ltd - 503310 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of LODR Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Issuance of Corporate Guarantee
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Swan Corp Limited has issued a Corporate Guarantee amounting to Rs. 72.57 Crores (Rupees Seventy Two Crores and Fifty Seven Lakhs). This guarantee is provided to secure the repayment obligation of Swan LNG Private Limited, a subsidiary company. The issuance of this guarantee does not have an immediate pecuniary impact on Swan Corp Limited. The transaction is being conducted at arm's length, with Swan LNG Private Limited being a subsidiary of Swan Corp Limited.

announcements.subject: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd - 543596 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR) - "Opening Of New Branches"
announcements.detail: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding "Opening of New Branches"
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Limited has announced the opening of three new branches. The branches will be located in Ballari, Karnataka; Anand, Gujarat; and Pandalkudi, Tamil Nadu. The Ballari branch is scheduled to open on March 30, 2026. The opening dates for the Anand and Pandalkudi branches are not explicitly stated but are implied to be around the same period. This expansion aims to increase the bank's reach and customer service points.

announcements.subject: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd - 544526 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of Order
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Saatvik Green Energy Limited's material subsidiary, Saatvik Solar Industries Private Limited, has secured a new order valued at INR 14.48 Crores. This order is from a renowned Independent Power producer/EPC Player for the supply of Solar PV Modules. The order is for a domestic entity and is commercial in nature. The execution of this order is expected to be completed by March 2026. This development signifies a new business opportunity for the company in the solar energy sector.

announcements.subject: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Ltd - 544309 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Update under Regulation 30(7) of the SEBI LODR Regulations with respect to investment in Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary.
announcements.ai_summary: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Ltd. has acquired 29,541 shares of its wholly owned subsidiary, Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Inc. (IKS Inc.), as the first tranche of investment. This investment amounts to USD 19,000,476/-. This disclosure is made in continuation of the Board's approval for further investment in IKS Inc., previously communicated on March 13, 2026. The company is providing this update in accordance with Regulation 30(7) of the SEBI LODR Regulations.

announcements.subject: Century Enka Ltd - 500280 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Company has made application  for an additional 37,96,086 equity shares of ABREL Century Energy Ltd., a Special Purpose Vehicle by way of right issue.
announcements.ai_summary: Century Enka Ltd. has applied to acquire an additional 37,96,086 equity shares of ABREL Century Energy Ltd., a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV), through a rights issue. This acquisition is necessary to maintain a minimum of 26% equity in the Power Producer, which is a requirement to qualify as a Captive User under the Electricity Act, 2003. ABRELCEL was incorporated on March 10, 2022, and had a turnover of Rs. 1,949.10 Lakhs as of March 31, 2025. The shares are being acquired at par value, making this an arm's length transaction. The acquisition is part of the group's strategy to qualify its power plant as a group captive power plant.

announcements.subject: Shemaroo Entertainment Ltd - 538685 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Please refer file attached herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: Shemaroo Entertainment Limited's Preferential Issue Committee has approved the allotment of 14,10,000 equity shares at an issue price of Rs. 110 per share (including a premium of Rs. 100 per share) on a preferential basis. The total amount raised through this allotment is Rs. 15.51 crores. These shares are being allotted to promoters and promoter group members, including Atul Hirji Maru (3,52,500 shares), Raman Hirji Maroo (3,52,500 shares), Hiren Uday Gada (3,52,500 shares), and Jai Buddhichand Maroo (3,52,500 shares), towards repayment or appropriation of existing unsecured debt. This approval was granted on March 27, 2026, following in-principle approval from stock exchanges and shareholder approval on March 13, 2026.

announcements.subject: Polycab India Ltd - 542652 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation of Effective date of Amalgamation
announcements.ai_summary: Polycab India Limited has announced that the Scheme of Amalgamation of Uniglobus Electricals and Electronics Private Limited with Polycab India Limited has become operative and effective from March 27, 2026. This follows the pronouncement of an order by the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench, approving the scheme on February 27, 2026. The certified copy of the NCLT order has been filed with the respective jurisdictional Registrar of Companies on March 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd - 544256 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Intimation of Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: P N Gadgil Jewellers Limited has announced the launch of its new store in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, on March 27, 2026. This marks the 76th overall store for the brand and its 4th store in Uttar Pradesh. The new store, located in a prime retail area, is 6000 sq ft and features a wide range of gold, diamond, and bridal jewellery, including collections like Saptam, Katha, Pratha, Eiina, and Polmi. This expansion is aimed at intensifying the company's retail strength in Central India.

announcements.subject: G R Infraprojects Ltd - 543317 - G R Infraprojects Limited Has Emerged As L-1 Bidder For A Project.
announcements.detail: G R Infraprojects Limited has emerged as L-1 Bidder for a project.
announcements.ai_summary: G R Infraprojects Limited has emerged as the L-1 bidder for a project titled "Upgradation of Existing Two-Lane Carriageway to Four Lane Divided Carriageway from Ch. 208+90 (Existing Km. 535.93) in Nasarpore Village in Umarpada Taluka to Ch. 269+11 (Existing Km. 608.51) in Malotha Village in Vyara Taluka (Length 60.21 Km.) Section of NH-56 in Gujarat on HAM (Pkg-VI)." The contract price for this project is INR 1453.57 Crores, to be executed on a Hybrid Annuity Mode (HAM) with a completion period of 910 days from the appointed date. This information is disclosed in accordance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Kranti Industries Ltd - 542459 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: As per the Regulation 30 and other applicable provisions of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we hereby inform you that pursuant to the execution of Share Purchase Agreement dated March 27, 2026 between Kranti Industries Limited ("Company") and Mr. Sunil Gadiya and Mr. Kunal Vora, the Company has transferred 8,00,000 Equity Shares of Preciso Metall Pvt. Ltd. Consequently, Preciso Metall Pvt. Ltd. ceased ....
announcements.ai_summary: Kranti Industries Limited has divested 8,00,000 equity shares of Preciso Metall Private Limited, each with a face value of ₹10, on March 27, 2026. This transaction was executed through a Share Purchase Agreement with Mr. Kunal Vijay Vora and Mr. Sunil Rameshlal Gadiya.
